metadata.name: allods_addons_knowledge
metadata.purpose: Searchable inventory and source snapshot of current addon PAK files. Text sources are embedded; binary resources remain authoritative in the original PAK files.

usage_rules: Use this file to inspect the exact contents and source code of PAK files currently stored in the addons folder.
Treat the original PAK files as authoritative for binary resources and archive layout.
A runtime knowledge mention does not prove that the exact package version was tested unless an explicit report says so.
Record verified behavior and failed approaches in allods_runtime_knowledge.json; keep implementation snapshots in this file.
Do not infer source code from compiled .luac entries.

runtime_knowledge.note: No package or internal addon name was found in runtime knowledge; behavior and lessons still need explicit documentation.

local ADDON_NAME = "ChatGPT_AllodsMover_v8_HudMover"
local CONFIG_SECTION = "ChatGPT_HudTools_Mover_v22_Positions"
local REGISTER_RETRY_SECONDS = 30

-- v21: PLAYER_FRAME moves Avatar itself (single widget). All children ride along.

local windows = {
	player_frame = {
		title = "PLAYER_FRAME",
		handleWidgetName = "PlayerCoreMoveHandle",
		handleWidth = 70,
		handleHeight = 70,
		-- Move Avatar itself: all children ride along automatically.
		-- linked = extra windows that get the same delta when this handle is dragged.
		root = "Plates",
		windowPath = { "Avatar" },
		displayRoot = "Plates",
		displayPath = { "Avatar", "Frame", "Portrait" },
		offsetX = 0,
		offsetY = 0,
		linked = { "buffs_row" }
	},
	class_resource = {
		title = "CLASS_RESOURCE_PANEL",
		root = "Plates",
		windowPath = { "Avatar", "PriestVars" },
		displayPath = { "Avatar", "PriestVars" },
		handleWidgetName = "ClassResourceMoveHandle",
		handleWidth = 190,
		handleHeight = 38,
		offsetX = 0,
		offsetY = 0
	},
	buffs_row = {
		title = "BUFFS_ROW",
		root = "Buffs",
		windowPath = { "Avatar" },
		displayPath = { "Avatar" },
		handleWidgetName = "BuffsRowMoveHandle",
		handleWidth = 14,
		handleHeight = 40,
		offsetX = 0,
		offsetY = 0
	},
	armor_indicator = {
		title = "MOUNT_ARMOR_PLATE",
		root = "Plates",
		windowPath = { "Mount" },
		displayPath = { "Mount" },
		handleWidgetName = "ArmorPlateMoveHandle",
		handleWidth = 180,
		handleHeight = 64,
		offsetX = 0,
		offsetY = 0
	}
}

local windowOrder = { "player_frame", "class_resource", "buffs_row", "armor_indicator" }

local handles = {}
local registeredIds = {}
local idToKey = {}
local activeDrag = nil
local config = nil
local seconds = 0
local applied = {}
local handleWasVisible = {}

local function log(message)
	if common and common.LogInfo then common.LogInfo(ADDON_NAME, tostring(message)) end
end

local function safeCall(label, fn)
	local ok, result = pcall(fn)
	if ok then return result end
	log("ERROR " .. tostring(label) .. ": " .. tostring(result))
	return nil
end

local function getChild(widget, name)
	if not widget or not widget.GetChildUnchecked then return nil end
	return safeCall("GetChildUnchecked " .. tostring(name), function()
		return widget:GetChildUnchecked(name, false)
	end)
end

local function getByPath(rootName, path)
	local root = safeCall("stateMainForm", function() return stateMainForm end)
	local widget = getChild(root, rootName)
	if not widget then return nil end
	for _, name in ipairs(path or {}) do
		widget = getChild(widget, name)
		if not widget then return nil end
	end
	return widget
end

local function getItemWidget(item)
	return getByPath(item.root, item.path)
end

local function getWindow(info)
	if not info or not info.root then return nil end
	return getByPath(info.root, info.windowPath)
end

local function getDisplayWindow(info)
	if not info then return nil end
	if info.displayRoot then return getByPath(info.displayRoot, info.displayPath) end
	return getByPath(info.root, info.displayPath or info.windowPath)
end

local function getPlacement(widget)
	return safeCall("GetPlacementPlain", function()
		if widget and widget.GetPlacementPlain then return widget:GetPlacementPlain() end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function setPlacement(widget, place)
	return safeCall("SetPlacementPlain", function()
		if widget and widget.SetPlacementPlain and type(place) == "table" then
			widget:SetPlacementPlain(place)
			return true
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function getRealRect(widget)
	return safeCall("GetRealRect", function()
		if widget and widget.GetRealRect then return widget:GetRealRect() end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function copyPlacement(place)
	if type(place) ~= "table" then return nil end
	return {
		alignX = place.alignX, alignY = place.alignY,
		sizingX = place.sizingX, sizingY = place.sizingY,
		posX = place.posX, posY = place.posY,
		highPosX = place.highPosX, highPosY = place.highPosY,
		sizeX = place.sizeX, sizeY = place.sizeY
	}
end

local function stablePlacement(place)
	local p = copyPlacement(place)
	if not p then return nil end
	p.alignX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignX
	p.alignY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignY
	p.highPosX = 0
	p.highPosY = 0
	if p.posX == nil then p.posX = 0 end
	if p.posY == nil then p.posY = 0 end
	return p
end

local function showWidget(widget, visible)
	safeCall("Show", function() if widget and widget.Show then widget:Show(visible) end end)
end

local function isWidgetVisible(widget)
	return safeCall("IsVisible", function()
		return widget and widget.IsVisible and widget:IsVisible()
	end) == true
end

local function getScreen()
	return safeCall("GetPosConverterParams", function()
		if common and common.GetPosConverterParams then return common.GetPosConverterParams() end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function scaleFromReal()
	local screen = getScreen()
	if screen and screen.realSizeX and screen.realSizeY and screen.realSizeX ~= 0 and screen.realSizeY ~= 0 then
		return screen.fullVirtualSizeX / screen.realSizeX, screen.fullVirtualSizeY / screen.realSizeY
	end
	return 1, 1
end

local function deltaForPlacement(dx, dy, place)
	local sx, sy = scaleFromReal()
	local useRealX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW_ABS and place and place.alignX == WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW_ABS
	local useRealY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW_ABS and place and place.alignY == WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW_ABS
	return useRealX and dx or dx * sx, useRealY and dy or dy * sy
end

local function movedPlacementRaw(startPlace, dx, dy)
	local place = copyPlacement(startPlace)
	if not place then return nil end
	local vx, vy = deltaForPlacement(dx, dy, place)
	vx = math.floor(vx)
	vy = math.floor(vy)
	if WIDGET_ALIGN_HIGH and place.alignX == WIDGET_ALIGN_HIGH then
		place.highPosX = (place.highPosX or 0) - vx
	elseif WIDGET_ALIGN_BOTH and place.alignX == WIDGET_ALIGN_BOTH then
		place.posX = (place.posX or 0) + vx
		place.highPosX = (place.highPosX or 0) - vx
	else
		place.posX = (place.posX or 0) + vx
	end
	if WIDGET_ALIGN_HIGH and place.alignY == WIDGET_ALIGN_HIGH then
		place.highPosY = (place.highPosY or 0) - vy
	elseif WIDGET_ALIGN_BOTH and place.alignY == WIDGET_ALIGN_BOTH then
		place.posY = (place.posY or 0) + vy
		place.highPosY = (place.highPosY or 0) - vy
	else
		place.posY = (place.posY or 0) + vy
	end
	return place
end

local function movedPlacement(startPlace, dx, dy)
	local place = movedPlacementRaw(startPlace, dx, dy)
	return stablePlacement(place)
end

local function lowPlacementFromRealRect(widget, fallbackPlace)
	local rect = getRealRect(widget)
	local base = copyPlacement(fallbackPlace) or getPlacement(widget) or {}
	if type(rect) ~= "table" or rect.x1 == nil or rect.y1 == nil or rect.x2 == nil or rect.y2 == nil then
		return stablePlacement(base)
	end
	local sx, sy = scaleFromReal()
	base.alignX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or base.alignX
	base.alignY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or base.alignY
	base.posX = math.floor(rect.x1 * sx)
	base.posY = math.floor(rect.y1 * sy)
	base.highPosX = 0
	base.highPosY = 0
	if base.sizeX == nil or base.sizeX == 0 then base.sizeX = math.floor((rect.x2 - rect.x1) * sx) end
	if base.sizeY == nil or base.sizeY == 0 then base.sizeY = math.floor((rect.y2 - rect.y1) * sy) end
	return base
end

local function isTableEmpty(t)
	if type(t) ~= "table" then return true end
	for _ in pairs(t) do return false end
	return true
end

local function loadConfig()
	if config ~= nil then return end
	config = {}
	if userMods and userMods.GetGlobalConfigSection then
		local loaded = safeCall("GetGlobalConfigSection", function()
			return userMods.GetGlobalConfigSection(CONFIG_SECTION)
		end)
		if type(loaded) == "table" then config = loaded end
	end
end

local function saveConfig()
	loadConfig()
	if userMods and userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection then
		safeCall("SetGlobalConfigSection", function() userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection(CONFIG_SECTION, config) end)
	elseif userMods and userMods.SetAvatarConfigSection then
		safeCall("SetAvatarConfigSection fallback", function() userMods.SetAvatarConfigSection(CONFIG_SECTION, config) end)
	end
end

local function applySavedGroup(key, force)
	loadConfig()
	local saved = config[key]
	local info = windows[key]
	if type(saved) ~= "table" or type(saved.items) ~= "table" or (applied[key] and not force) then return end
	for _, item in ipairs(info.group or {}) do
		local widget = getItemWidget(item)
		local place = saved.items[item.id]
		if widget and type(place) == "table" then setPlacement(widget, copyPlacement(place)) end
	end
	applied[key] = true
	log("APPLIED " .. info.title)
end

local function applySavedSingle(key, widget, force)
	loadConfig()
	local saved = config[key]
	if type(saved) == "table" and widget and (force or not applied[key]) then
		setPlacement(widget, stablePlacement(saved))
		applied[key] = true
		log("APPLIED " .. windows[key].title)
	end
end

local function applySavedPlacement(key, force)
	local info = windows[key]
	if info and info.group then applySavedGroup(key, force) else applySavedSingle(key, getWindow(info), force) end
end

local function syncHandle(key)
	local info = windows[key]
	local handle = handles[key]
	if not info or not handle then return end
	local window = getDisplayWindow(info)
	if not window or not isWidgetVisible(window) then showWidget(handle, false); return end
	local rect = getRealRect(window)
	if type(rect) ~= "table" or rect.x1 == nil or rect.y1 == nil then showWidget(handle, false); return end
	local sx, sy = scaleFromReal()
	local place = getPlacement(handle)
	if place then
		place.alignX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW
		place.alignY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW
		place.posX = math.floor((rect.x1 + (info.offsetX or 0)) * sx)
		place.posY = math.floor((rect.y1 + (info.offsetY or 0)) * sy)
		place.highPosX = 0
		place.highPosY = 0
		place.sizeX = math.floor((info.handleWidth or 50) * sx)
		place.sizeY = math.floor((info.handleHeight or 50) * sy)
		setPlacement(handle, place)
	end
	showWidget(handle, true)
	if not handleWasVisible[key] then
		handleWasVisible[key] = true
		log("HANDLE_READY " .. info.title .. " x=" .. tostring(math.floor(rect.x1)) .. " y=" .. tostring(math.floor(rect.y1)))
	end
end

local function registerHandle(key)
	local info = windows[key]
	local handle = handles[key]
	if not handle or registeredIds[key] then return end
	applySavedPlacement(key, false)
	local state = safeCall("DNDGetState " .. key, function()
		if handle.DNDGetState then return handle:DNDGetState() end
		return DND_STATE_NOT_REGISTERED
	end)
	if state ~= nil and DND_STATE_NOT_REGISTERED and state ~= DND_STATE_NOT_REGISTERED then
		log("SKIP_REGISTER " .. info.title .. " state=" .. tostring(state))
		return
	end
	local id = safeCall("DNDRegisterGeneric " .. key, function()
		if handle.DNDRegisterGeneric then return handle:DNDRegisterGeneric(true) end
		return nil
	end)
	if id then
		registeredIds[key] = id
		idToKey[id] = key
		log("REGISTERED " .. info.title .. " id=" .. tostring(id))
	end
end

local function registerAll()
	for _, key in ipairs(windowOrder) do registerHandle(key); syncHandle(key) end
end

local function buildDragItems(key)
	local info = windows[key]
	local items = {}
	if info.group then
		for _, item in ipairs(info.group) do
			local widget = getItemWidget(item)
			local place = getPlacement(widget)
			if widget and place then
				local localPlace = copyPlacement(place)
				table.insert(items, { id = item.id, widget = widget, startPlace = copyPlacement(localPlace), lastPlace = copyPlacement(localPlace), raw = true })
			end
		end
	else
		local widget = getWindow(info)
		local place = getPlacement(widget)
		if widget and place then
			local lowPlace = lowPlacementFromRealRect(widget, place) or stablePlacement(place)
			if lowPlace then setPlacement(widget, lowPlace) end
			table.insert(items, { id = key, widget = widget, startPlace = copyPlacement(lowPlace), lastPlace = copyPlacement(lowPlace) })
		end
	end
	-- linked windows: move together with this handle
	for _, linkedKey in ipairs(info.linked or {}) do
		local linkedInfo = windows[linkedKey]
		if linkedInfo then
			local widget = getWindow(linkedInfo)
			local place = getPlacement(widget)
			if widget and place then
				local lowPlace = lowPlacementFromRealRect(widget, place) or stablePlacement(place)
				if lowPlace then setPlacement(widget, lowPlace) end
				table.insert(items, { id = linkedKey, widget = widget, startPlace = copyPlacement(lowPlace), lastPlace = copyPlacement(lowPlace), linkedKey = linkedKey })
			end
		end
	end
	return items
end

local function OnDndPick(params)
	local key = params and idToKey[params.srcId]
	if not key then return end
	local items = buildDragItems(key)
	if #items == 0 then return end
	activeDrag = { key = key, startX = params.posX or 0, startY = params.posY or 0, items = items, primed = false }
	if params.srcWidget and params.srcWidget.DNDConfirmPickAttempt then params.srcWidget:DNDConfirmPickAttempt() end
	log("DRAG_START " .. windows[key].title)
end

local function updateDrag(params)
	if not activeDrag or not params or params.posX == nil or params.posY == nil then return end
	if not activeDrag.primed then
		activeDrag.startX = params.posX or 0
		activeDrag.startY = params.posY or 0
		activeDrag.primed = true
		return
	end
	local dx = (params.posX or activeDrag.startX) - activeDrag.startX
	local dy = (params.posY or activeDrag.startY) - activeDrag.startY
	if math.abs(dx) > 4000 or math.abs(dy) > 4000 then
		log("IGNORED_BAD_DND_DELTA dx=" .. tostring(dx) .. " dy=" .. tostring(dy))
		return
	end
	for _, data in ipairs(activeDrag.items or {}) do
		local place = data.raw and movedPlacementRaw(data.startPlace, dx, dy) or movedPlacement(data.startPlace, dx, dy)
		if data.widget and place then
			setPlacement(data.widget, place)
			data.lastPlace = copyPlacement(place)
		end
	end
end

local function OnDndDragTo(params)
	if activeDrag and params and idToKey[params.srcId] == activeDrag.key then updateDrag(params) end
end

local function finishDrag(params, cancelled)
	if not activeDrag then return end
	local key = activeDrag.key
	local info = windows[key]
	if cancelled then
		for _, data in ipairs(activeDrag.items or {}) do
			if data.widget and data.startPlace then setPlacement(data.widget, data.startPlace) end
		end
		log("DRAG_CANCEL " .. info.title)
	else
		updateDrag(params or {})
		loadConfig()
		if info.group then
			config[key] = { items = {} }
			for _, data in ipairs(activeDrag.items or {}) do
				if not data.linkedKey then
					local place = data.lastPlace or getPlacement(data.widget)
					if place then config[key].items[data.id] = copyPlacement(place) end
				end
			end
		else
			local data = activeDrag.items and activeDrag.items[1]
			local place = data and (data.lastPlace or getPlacement(data.widget))
			if place then config[key] = stablePlacement(place) end
		end
		-- save linked windows under their own config keys
		for _, data in ipairs(activeDrag.items or {}) do
			if data.linkedKey then
				local place = data.lastPlace or getPlacement(data.widget)
				if place then config[data.linkedKey] = stablePlacement(place) end
				log("SAVED_LINKED " .. data.linkedKey)
			end
		end
		saveConfig()
		log("SAVED " .. info.title)
		if params and params.srcWidget and params.srcWidget.DNDConfirmDropAttempt then params.srcWidget:DNDConfirmDropAttempt() end
		log("DRAG_FINISH " .. info.title)
	end
	activeDrag = nil
	syncHandle(key)
end

local function OnDndDrop(params)
	if activeDrag and params and idToKey[params.srcId] == activeDrag.key then finishDrag(params, false) end
end

local function OnDndCancel(params)
	if activeDrag and (not params or idToKey[params.srcId] == activeDrag.key) then finishDrag(params, true) end
end

local function OnSecondTimer()
	seconds = seconds + 1
	if seconds <= REGISTER_RETRY_SECONDS then registerAll() end
	if not activeDrag then
		for key in pairs(windows) do applySavedPlacement(key, false) end
	end
	for _, key in ipairs(windowOrder) do syncHandle(key) end
end

local function Init()
	log("START v12 hud mover")
	loadConfig()
	if mainForm and mainForm.GetChildChecked then
		for key, info in pairs(windows) do
			handles[key] = mainForm:GetChildChecked(info.handleWidgetName, false)
			showWidget(handles[key], false)
		end
	end
	registerAll()
	if common and common.RegisterEventHandler then
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnSecondTimer, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnDndPick, "EVENT_DND_PICK_ATTEMPT")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnDndDragTo, "EVENT_DND_DRAG_TO")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnDndDrop, "EVENT_DND_DROP_ATTEMPT")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnDndCancel, "EVENT_DND_DRAG_CANCELLED")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(function() for _, key in ipairs(windowOrder) do syncHandle(key) end end, "EVENT_POS_CONVERTER_CHANGED")
	end
	log("READY v12 hud mover")
	log("END v12 hud mover")
end

if avatar and avatar.IsExist and avatar.IsExist() then
	Init()
else
	if common and common.RegisterEventHandler then common.RegisterEventHandler(Init, "EVENT_AVATAR_CREATED") else Init() end
end

local ADDON_NAME = "ChatGPT_AllodsMover_v19_WindowMover"
local CONFIG_SECTION = "ChatGPT_AllodsMover_v4_Positions"
local LEGACY_CONFIG_SECTION = "BagBankMover_v27_RemortRootApplyOnce_NoFlicker"
local LAB_CONFIG_SECTION = "BagBankMover_v9_LabVisits"
local REGISTER_RETRY_SECONDS = 60

local REMORT_ROW_STEP = 49
local REMORT_FORM_EXTRA_HEIGHT = 139
local REMORT_CONTENT_EXTRA_HEIGHT = -1

-- v25: keep v23 movement behavior.
-- New: only expand the visible RemortList height enough to fit all remort entries.
-- No scroll cap; do not touch the Remort position/anchors used for movement.

local handles = {}
local registeredIds = {}
local idToKey = {}
local activeDrag = nil
local config = nil
local seconds = 0
local handleWasVisible = {}
local appliedOnShow = {}
local remortAppliedAtBoot = false
local remortListReady = false
local remortLastApplySecond = -999  -- cooldown: prevents re-apply within 2s of last apply
local showWidget = nil
local labConfig = nil
local labTextDesc = nil
local labLabels = {}
local labDonePawsDesc = nil
local labDoneLobsterDesc = nil
local labDoneChoices = {}
local labLastSignature = ""
local labNoVisitsLogged = false
local labEventsDumped = false
local labLfgDumped = false
local labVisitsKnown = false
local labNextRetrySecond = 0
local LAB_LABEL_PREFIX = "\203\224\225\232\240\232\237\242\32"
local LAB_EVENT_NAME = "\203\224\225\232\240\232\237\242"

-- LabsRobbing-inspired text style: AllodsWest, outline/shadow, golden label and green value.
local LAB_TEXT_FORMAT = "<body alignx='right' aligny='middle' fontname='AllodsWest' fontsize='16' shadow='1' outline='1' shadowcolor='0x65000000' outlinecolor='0x4c000000'><tip_golden><r name='label'/></tip_golden> <tip_green><r name='value'/></tip_green></body>"
-- At 5/5 a real texture widget replaces the entire right-side text.

local windows = {
	bag = {
		title = "BAG",
		root = "ContextBag",
		windowPath = { "Bag" },
		handleWidgetName = "BagMoveHandle",
		useOverlay = true,
		handleWidth = 220,
		handleHeight = 30,
		offsetY = 0
	},
	remort = {
		title = "REMORT",
		root = "RemortList",
		-- Target is the outer FormSafe. The visible window is child RemortList.
		windowPath = {},
		displayPath = { "RemortList" },
		handleWidgetName = "RemortMoveHandle",
		useOverlay = true,
		handleWidth = 360,
		handleHeight = 28,
		offsetY = -14
	}
}

local function log(message)
	if common and common.LogInfo then
		common.LogInfo(ADDON_NAME, tostring(message))
	end
end

local function safeCall(label, fn)
	local ok, result = pcall(fn)
	if ok then
		return result
	end
	log("ERROR " .. label .. ": " .. tostring(result))
	return nil
end

local function getChild(widget, name)
	if not widget or not widget.GetChildUnchecked then
		return nil
	end
	return safeCall("GetChildUnchecked " .. name, function()
		return widget:GetChildUnchecked(name, false)
	end)
end

local function getByPath(rootName, path)
	local root = safeCall("stateMainForm", function() return stateMainForm end)
	local widget = getChild(root, rootName)
	for _, name in ipairs(path) do
		widget = getChild(widget, name)
		if not widget then
			return nil
		end
	end
	return widget
end

local function getWindow(info)
	return getByPath(info.root, info.windowPath)
end

local function getDisplayWindow(info)
	if type(info.displayPath) == "table" then
		return getByPath(info.root, info.displayPath)
	end
	return getWindow(info)
end


local function isWidgetVisible(widget)
	return safeCall("IsVisible", function()
		return widget and widget.IsVisible and widget:IsVisible()
	end) == true
end

local function getPlacement(widget)
	return safeCall("GetPlacementPlain", function()
		if widget and widget.GetPlacementPlain then
			return widget:GetPlacementPlain()
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function setPlacement(widget, place)
	return safeCall("SetPlacementPlain", function()
		if widget and widget.SetPlacementPlain then
			widget:SetPlacementPlain(place)
			return true
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function copyPlacement(place)
	if type(place) ~= "table" then
		return nil
	end
	return {
		alignX = place.alignX,
		alignY = place.alignY,
		sizingX = place.sizingX,
		sizingY = place.sizingY,
		posX = place.posX,
		posY = place.posY,
		highPosX = place.highPosX,
		highPosY = place.highPosY,
		sizeX = place.sizeX,
		sizeY = place.sizeY
	}
end


local function countTableItems(t)
	if type(t) ~= "table" then
		return 0
	end
	local n = 0
	for _ in pairs(t) do
		n = n + 1
	end
	return n
end

local function getNamedChildren(widget)
	return safeCall("GetNamedChildren", function()
		if widget and widget.GetNamedChildren then
			return widget:GetNamedChildren()
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function getRemortContentPanel()
	-- Verified by WidgetTreeLogger_v34_Remort:
	-- RemortList.RemortList.Content.__Border.__Content holds actual Entry rows.
	return getByPath("RemortList", { "RemortList", "Content", "__Border", "__Content" })
end

local function getVisualRemortCount()
	return countTableItems(getNamedChildren(getRemortContentPanel()))
end

local function getSortedChildrenByY(widget)
	local children = getNamedChildren(widget)
	local result = {}
	if type(children) ~= "table" then
		return result
	end
	for _, child in pairs(children) do
		local place = getPlacement(child)
		table.insert(result, { widget = child, y = place and place.posY or 0 })
	end
	table.sort(result, function(a, b)
		return (a.y or 0) < (b.y or 0)
	end)
	return result
end

local function getRemortCount()
	-- AdvancedRemortList uses the remort library.  Support both remort.* and
	-- plain globals so the code survives different client builds.
	local ok = true
	if remort and remort.CanGetRemortsList then
		ok = safeCall("remort.CanGetRemortsList", function() return remort.CanGetRemortsList() end) ~= false
	elseif CanGetRemortsList then
		ok = safeCall("CanGetRemortsList", function() return CanGetRemortsList() end) ~= false
	end
	if not ok then
		return 0
	end
	local list = nil
	if remort and remort.GetRemortsList then
		list = safeCall("remort.GetRemortsList", function() return remort.GetRemortsList() end)
	elseif GetRemortsList then
		list = safeCall("GetRemortsList", function() return GetRemortsList() end)
	end
	local apiCount = countTableItems(list)
	local visualCount = getVisualRemortCount()
	if visualCount > apiCount then
		return visualCount
	end
	return apiCount
end

local function toPlainText(value)
	if value == nil then
		return nil
	end
	if type(value) == "string" then
		return value
	end
	if userMods and userMods.FromWString and value.ToWString then
		return safeCall("FromWString", function()
			return userMods.FromWString(value:ToWString())
		end)
	end
	if userMods and userMods.FromWString then
		return safeCall("FromWString direct", function()
			return userMods.FromWString(value)
		end) or tostring(value)
	end
	return tostring(value)
end

local function getCurrentServerName()
	if mission and mission.GetShardName then
		return safeCall("GetShardName", function()
			local shard = mission.GetShardName()
			if shard and shard.ToAbbr then
				return userMods.FromWString(shard:ToAbbr())
			end
			return toPlainText(shard)
		end)
	end
	return nil
end

		end)

end

local function getCurrentAvatarLevel()
	if avatar and avatar.GetId and unit and unit.GetLevel then

		end)

end

local function remortNameToText(remortInfo)
	if type(remortInfo) ~= "table" then
		return nil

	return toPlainText(remortInfo.name or remortInfo.Name or remortInfo.avatarName)
end

local function getRemortList()
	local ok = true
	if remort and remort.CanGetRemortsList then
		ok = safeCall("lab remort.CanGetRemortsList", function() return remort.CanGetRemortsList() end) ~= false
	elseif CanGetRemortsList then
		ok = safeCall("lab CanGetRemortsList", function() return CanGetRemortsList() end) ~= false
	end
	if not ok then
		return nil
	end
	if remort and remort.GetRemortsList then
		return safeCall("lab remort.GetRemortsList", function() return remort.GetRemortsList() end)
	elseif GetRemortsList then

local function loadLabConfig()
	if labConfig ~= nil then
		return
	end
	labConfig = { data = {} }
	if userMods and userMods.GetGlobalConfigSection then
		local loaded = safeCall("GetGlobalConfigSection labs", function()
			return userMods.GetGlobalConfigSection(LAB_CONFIG_SECTION)
		end)
		if type(loaded) == "table" then
			labConfig = loaded
		end
		if type(labConfig.data) ~= "table" then
			labConfig.data = {}
		end
	end
end

local function saveLabConfig()
	loadLabConfig()
	if userMods and userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection then
		safeCall("SetGlobalConfigSection labs", function()
			userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection(LAB_CONFIG_SECTION, labConfig)
		end)
	end
end

local function getGlobalDateTimeMs()
	if mission and mission.GetGlobalDateTime then
		return safeCall("mission.GetGlobalDateTime overallMs", function()
			local dt = mission.GetGlobalDateTime()
			return dt and dt.overallMs
		end)
	end
	return nil
end

local function getCurrentLabWeekStartMs()
	if not mission or not mission.GetGlobalDateTime or not common or not common.GetMsFromDateTime then
		return nil
	end
	return safeCall("getCurrentLabWeekStartMs", function()
		local dt = mission.GetGlobalDateTime()
		if type(dt) ~= "table" then
			return nil
		end
		local daysBack = 0
		if dt.wday == 1 then
			daysBack = 4
		elseif dt.wday == 2 then
			daysBack = 5
		elseif dt.wday == 3 then
			daysBack = 6
		elseif dt.wday == 4 then
			daysBack = 0
		elseif dt.wday == 5 then
			daysBack = 1
		elseif dt.wday == 6 then
			daysBack = 2
		elseif dt.wday == 7 then
			daysBack = 3
		end
		local beginDay = {
			y = dt.y,
			m = dt.m,
			d = dt.d,
			h = 2,
			min = 0,
			s = 0,
			ms = 0
		}
		return common.GetMsFromDateTime(beginDay) - daysBack * 86400000
	end)
end

local function resetOldLabWeekData()
	loadLabConfig()
	local weekStart = getCurrentLabWeekStartMs()
	local nowMs = getGlobalDateTimeMs() or weekStart
	if not weekStart or type(labConfig.data) ~= "table" then
		return false
	end
	local changed = false
	for key, value in pairs(labConfig.data) do
		if type(value) == "table" then
			local dateTime = tonumber(value.dateTime)
			if dateTime and dateTime < weekStart then
				value.weekly = 0
				value.dateTime = nowMs
				changed = true
				log("LAB_WEEK_RESET_V18 " .. tostring(key))
			elseif not dateTime then
				value.dateTime = nowMs
				changed = true
			end
		end
	end
	if changed then
		saveLabConfig()
	end
	return changed
end

local function getLabVisitsFromMatchMaking()
	local result = nil
	if not matchMaking or not matchMaking.GetEvents then
		if not labEventsDumped then
			log("LAB_EVENTS_DUMP_V17 matchMaking_or_GetEvents_missing")
			labEventsDumped = true
		end
		return nil
	end
	safeCall("matchMaking.ListenEvents true", function()
		if matchMaking.ListenEvents then
			matchMaking.ListenEvents(true)
		end
	end)

	local events = safeCall("matchMaking.GetEvents", function()
		return matchMaking.GetEvents()
	end)
	if type(events) ~= "table" then
		log("LAB_EVENTS_WAIT_V19 eventsType=" .. tostring(type(events)))
		return nil
	end
	if not labEventsDumped then
		log("LAB_EVENTS_READY_V19 count=" .. tostring(countTableItems(events)))
	end
	if type(events) == "table" then
		for _, eventId in pairs(events) do
			local eventInfo = safeCall("matchMaking.GetEventInfo", function()
				return matchMaking.GetEventInfo(eventId)
			end)
			if type(eventInfo) == "table" then
				local maxVisits = tonumber(eventInfo.maxVisitsPerWeek)
				local weeklyVisits = tonumber(eventInfo.weeklyVisits)
				if not labEventsDumped then
					local eventName = toPlainText(eventInfo.name or eventInfo.eventName or eventInfo.sysName or eventInfo.id)
					log("LAB_EVENT_V19 id=" .. tostring(eventId) ..
						" name=" .. tostring(eventName) ..
						" weekly=" .. tostring(eventInfo.weeklyVisits) ..
						" max=" .. tostring(eventInfo.maxVisitsPerWeek) ..
						" daily=" .. tostring(eventInfo.dailyVisits) ..
						" maxDaily=" .. tostring(eventInfo.maxVisitsPerDay) ..
						" available=" .. tostring(eventInfo.available))
				end
				local eventName = toPlainText(eventInfo.name or eventInfo.eventName or eventInfo.sysName)
				if eventName == LAB_EVENT_NAME and maxVisits ~= nil then
					-- The client represents zero weekly Labyrinth visits as nil.
					-- LabsInfo used the same rule: initialize to zero, then replace
					-- it only when weeklyVisits is present.
					local normalizedWeekly = weeklyVisits or 0
					result = { weekly = normalizedWeekly, max = maxVisits }
					log("LAB_FOUND_V25 rawWeekly=" .. tostring(eventInfo.weeklyVisits) ..
						" normalized=" .. tostring(normalizedWeekly) ..
						" max=" .. tostring(maxVisits))
					break
				end
			elseif not labEventsDumped then
				log("LAB_EVENT_V17 id=" .. tostring(eventId) .. " infoType=" .. tostring(type(eventInfo)))
			end
		end
	end
	labEventsDumped = true
	return result
end

local function updateCurrentLabVisits()
	loadLabConfig()
	local name = getCurrentAvatarName()
	local server = getCurrentServerName()
	local visits = getLabVisitsFromMatchMaking()
	if not name or not server or type(visits) ~= "table" then
		if not labNoVisitsLogged then
			log("LAB_NO_CURRENT_VISITS_V17 name=" .. tostring(name) .. " server=" .. tostring(server) .. " visits=" .. tostring(type(visits)))
			labNoVisitsLogged = true
		end
		return false
	end
	local key = name .. "-" .. server
	labConfig.data[key] = {
		name = name,
		server = server,
		level = getCurrentAvatarLevel(),
		weekly = tonumber(visits.weekly),
		max = tonumber(visits.max),
		updatedAt = seconds,
		dateTime = getGlobalDateTimeMs()
	}
	saveLabConfig()
	labVisitsKnown = true
	log("LAB_SAVE_V25 " .. key .. " " .. tostring(labConfig.data[key].weekly) .. "/" .. tostring(labConfig.data[key].max))
	return true
end

local function getLabTextDesc()
	if labTextDesc then
		return labTextDesc
	end
	local prototype = mainForm and getChild(mainForm, "BBMLabVisitText")
	if prototype and prototype.GetWidgetDesc then
		labTextDesc = safeCall("LabVisitText GetWidgetDesc", function()
			return prototype:GetWidgetDesc()
		end)
	end
	return labTextDesc
end

local function getLabDoneDesc(kind)
	if kind == "paws" and labDonePawsDesc then return labDonePawsDesc end
	if kind == "lobster" and labDoneLobsterDesc then return labDoneLobsterDesc end
	local widgetName = kind == "lobster" and "BBMLabDoneLobster" or "BBMLabDonePaws"
	local prototype = mainForm and getChild(mainForm, widgetName)
	local desc = nil
	if prototype and prototype.GetWidgetDesc then
		desc = safeCall("LabDone GetWidgetDesc " .. kind, function() return prototype:GetWidgetDesc() end)
	end
	if kind == "lobster" then labDoneLobsterDesc = desc else labDonePawsDesc = desc end
	return desc
end

local function getOrCreateLabDoneIcon(entry, kind)
	if not entry then return nil end
	local widgetName = kind == "lobster" and "BBMLabDoneLobster" or "BBMLabDonePaws"
	local existing = getChild(entry, widgetName)
	if existing then return existing end
	local desc = getLabDoneDesc(kind)
	if not desc or not mainForm or not mainForm.CreateWidgetByDesc then return nil end
	local widget = safeCall("Create LabDone " .. kind, function() return mainForm:CreateWidgetByDesc(desc) end)
	if widget and entry.AddChild then
		safeCall("Entry AddChild LabDone " .. kind, function() entry:AddChild(widget) end)
		return widget
	end
	return nil
end

local labRandomSeededV19 = false

local function ensureLabRandomSeedV19(extra)
	if labRandomSeededV19 then return end
	local now = 0
	if common and common.GetAbsTimeMs then
		now = tonumber(common.GetAbsTimeMs()) or 0
	end
	local seed = math.floor(now % 2147483000) + (tonumber(extra) or 0) * 7919 + 173
	math.randomseed(seed)
	math.random(); math.random(); math.random()
	labRandomSeededV19 = true
	log("LAB_RANDOM_SEED_V19 " .. tostring(seed))
end

local function getRandomDoneKind(name)
	local key = name or tostring(countTableItems(labDoneChoices) + 1)
	if not labDoneChoices[key] then
		ensureLabRandomSeedV19(#key)
		labDoneChoices[key] = (math.random(1, 2) == 1) and "paws" or "lobster"
		log("LAB_DONE_RANDOM_V19 " .. tostring(key) .. "=" .. tostring(labDoneChoices[key]))
	end
	return labDoneChoices[key]
end

local function getOrCreateLabLabel(entry, index)
	if not entry then
		return nil
	end
	local existing = getChild(entry, "BBMLabVisitText")
	if existing then
		return existing
	end
	local desc = getLabTextDesc()
	if not desc or not mainForm or not mainForm.CreateWidgetByDesc then
		return nil
	end
	local widget = safeCall("Create LabVisitText", function()
		return mainForm:CreateWidgetByDesc(desc)
	end)
	if widget and entry.AddChild then
		safeCall("Entry AddChild LabVisitText", function()
			entry:AddChild(widget)
		end)
		labLabels[index or widget] = widget
		return widget
	end
	return nil
end

local function setLabLabelText(widget, text)
	if not widget then
		return
	end
	safeCall("LabVisitText SetVal", function()
		widget:SetVal("value", userMods.ToWString(text))
	end)
	showWidget(widget, true)
end

local function clearNativeRoleText(entry)
	local classWidget = getChild(entry, "Class")
	if not classWidget then
		return
	end
	safeCall("Clear native remort role", function()
		local empty = userMods.ToWString("")
		classWidget:SetVal("label", empty)
		classWidget:SetVal("value", empty)
	end)
end

local function setEntryLabText(entry, weekly, maxVisits, avatarName)
	local classWidget = getChild(entry, "Class")
	if not classWidget then
		return false
	end
	local current = tonumber(weekly) or 0
	local maximum = tonumber(maxVisits) or 0
	local completed = maximum > 0 and current >= maximum
	local doneKind = getRandomDoneKind(avatarName)
	local pawsIcon = getChild(entry, "BBMLabDonePaws")
	local lobsterIcon = getChild(entry, "BBMLabDoneLobster")
	if completed then
		if doneKind == "paws" then
			pawsIcon = pawsIcon or getOrCreateLabDoneIcon(entry, "paws")
		else
			lobsterIcon = lobsterIcon or getOrCreateLabDoneIcon(entry, "lobster")
		end
	end
	local ok = safeCall("Set remort Labyrinth styled text", function()
		classWidget:SetFormat(LAB_TEXT_FORMAT)
		if completed then
			-- Replace the whole "Лабиринт 5/5" line with a real Allods-style checked icon.
			classWidget:SetVal("label", userMods.ToWString(""))
			classWidget:SetVal("value", userMods.ToWString(""))
		else
			classWidget:SetVal("label", userMods.ToWString(LAB_EVENT_NAME))
			classWidget:SetVal("value", userMods.ToWString(tostring(current) .. "/" .. tostring(maximum)))
		end
		return true
	end)
	showWidget(pawsIcon, completed and doneKind == "paws")
	showWidget(lobsterIcon, completed and doneKind == "lobster")
	return ok == true
end

local function getTextWidgetValue(widget)
	if not widget then
		return nil
	end
	local value = safeCall("GetWString row name", function()
		if widget.GetWString then
			return widget:GetWString()
		end
		return nil
	end)
	if value == nil then
		value = safeCall("GetVal row name", function()
			if widget.GetVal then
				return widget:GetVal("value")
			end
			return nil
		end)
	end
	local text = toPlainText(value)
	if type(text) ~= "string" or text == "" then
		return nil
	end
	return text
end

local function getVisualRemortName(entry)
	local candidates = { "Name", "CharacterName", "AvatarName", "NameText" }
	for _, childName in ipairs(candidates) do
		local text = getTextWidgetValue(getChild(entry, childName))
		if text then
			-- The native row may append the level, for example: Name (120).
			text = string.gsub(text, "%s*%(%d+%)%s*$", "")
			text = string.gsub(text, "^%s+", "")
			text = string.gsub(text, "%s+$", "")
			if text ~= "" then
				return text
			end
		end
	end
	return nil
end

local function applyLabLabels()
	if activeDrag then
		return
	end
	loadLabConfig()
	resetOldLabWeekData()
	local content = getRemortContentPanel()
	if not content then
		return
	end
	local rows = getSortedChildrenByY(content)
	local server = getCurrentServerName()
	if not server then
		return
	end
	local parts = { tostring(#rows), tostring(server) }
	for index, row in ipairs(rows) do
		clearNativeRoleText(row.widget)
		local name = getVisualRemortName(row.widget) or ("row" .. tostring(index))
		local data = name and labConfig.data[name .. "-" .. server] or nil
		if type(data) == "table" then
			table.insert(parts, name .. "=" .. tostring(data.weekly) .. "/" .. tostring(data.max))
		else
			table.insert(parts, name .. "=unknown")
		end
	end
	local signature = table.concat(parts, "|")

	local applied = 0
	for index, row in ipairs(rows) do
		local name = getVisualRemortName(row.widget)
		local data = name and labConfig.data[name .. "-" .. server] or nil
		if type(data) == "table" and data.weekly ~= nil and data.max ~= nil then
			if setEntryLabText(row.widget, data.weekly, data.max, name) then
				applied = applied + 1
			end
		else
			clearNativeRoleText(row.widget)
			showWidget(getChild(row.widget, "BBMLabVisitText"), false)
			showWidget(getChild(row.widget, "BBMLabDonePaws"), false)
			showWidget(getChild(row.widget, "BBMLabDoneLobster"), false)
		end
	end
	if applied > 0 and labLastSignature ~= signature then
		labLastSignature = signature
		log("LAB_LABELS_V27 rows=" .. tostring(applied) .. " signature=" .. signature)
	end
end

local function OnLabVisitsChanged()
	if not remortListReady then
		return
	end
	resetOldLabWeekData()
	updateCurrentLabVisits()
	applyLabLabels()
end

local function expandRemortVisualHeight()
	-- v8: use geometry verified by WidgetTreeLogger_v34_Remort.
	-- Move/position belongs to the outer RemortList FormSafe.
	-- Scroll/list internals keep their own anchors; only their content height is synced.
	-- Do NOT force alignment or position - preserve whatever the movement code set.
	if activeDrag and activeDrag.key == "remort" then
		return
	end

	local root = getWindow(windows.remort)
	if not root then
		return
	end

	local count = getRemortCount()
	if type(count) ~= "number" or count <= 0 then
		-- Do not resize while the list is empty/loading (avoids flicker).
		return
	end

	local place = getPlacement(root)
	if type(place) ~= "table" then
		return
	end

	local desiredFormY = count * REMORT_ROW_STEP + REMORT_FORM_EXTRA_HEIGHT
	local rootChanged = false
	if type(place.sizeY) ~= "number" or math.floor(place.sizeY) ~= math.floor(desiredFormY) then
		local p = copyPlacement(place)
		if p then
			-- Only update height. Alignment and position are managed by the movement/save system.
			p.sizeY = math.floor(desiredFormY)
			setPlacement(root, p)
			rootChanged = true
		end
	end

	local desiredContentY = count * REMORT_ROW_STEP + REMORT_CONTENT_EXTRA_HEIGHT
	local innerChanged = false

	-- Open replacement for the removed AdvancedRemortList geometry logic.
	-- Verified tree: outer root -> RemortList panel -> Content -> __Border -> __Content.
	local panel = getDisplayWindow(windows.remort)
	local panelPlace = getPlacement(panel)
	if type(panelPlace) == "table" then
		local desiredPanelY = desiredContentY + 119
		if math.floor(panelPlace.sizeY or 0) ~= math.floor(desiredPanelY) or panelPlace.sizingY ~= 0 then
			local pp = copyPlacement(panelPlace)
			if pp then
				pp.sizingY = 0
				pp.sizeY = math.floor(desiredPanelY)
				setPlacement(panel, pp)
				innerChanged = true
			end
		end
	end

	local viewport = getByPath("RemortList", { "RemortList", "Content" })
	local viewportPlace = getPlacement(viewport)
	if type(viewportPlace) == "table" and math.floor(viewportPlace.sizeY or 0) ~= math.floor(desiredContentY + 2) then
		local vp = copyPlacement(viewportPlace)
		if vp then
			vp.sizeY = math.floor(desiredContentY + 2)
			setPlacement(viewport, vp)
			innerChanged = true
		end
	end

	local contentChanged = false
	local content = getRemortContentPanel()
	local contentPlace = getPlacement(content)
	if type(contentPlace) == "table" and math.floor(contentPlace.sizeY or 0) ~= math.floor(desiredContentY) then
		local cp = copyPlacement(contentPlace)
		if cp then
			cp.sizeY = math.floor(desiredContentY)
			setPlacement(content, cp)
			contentChanged = true
		end
	end

	local scrollBar = getByPath("RemortList", { "RemortList", "Content", "__ScrollBar" })
	showWidget(scrollBar, true)

	if rootChanged or innerChanged or contentChanged then
		log("REMORT_FULL_HEIGHT_V111 count=" .. tostring(count) ..
			" formY=" .. tostring(math.floor(desiredFormY)) ..
			" panelY=" .. tostring(math.floor(desiredContentY + 119)) ..
			" viewportY=" .. tostring(math.floor(desiredContentY + 2)) ..
			" contentChanged=" .. tostring(contentChanged) ..
			" innerChanged=" .. tostring(innerChanged) ..
			" rootChanged=" .. tostring(rootChanged))
	end
end

local function clampRemortPlacement(place)
	return place
end

local function stablePlacement(place)
	local p = copyPlacement(place)
	if not p then
		return nil
	end
	-- v5: keep only the low-anchor position model stable.
	-- Keep moved windows in one stable LOW-anchor coordinate model.
	p.alignX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignX
	p.alignY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignY
	p.highPosX = 0
	p.highPosY = 0
	if p.posX == nil then p.posX = 0 end
	if p.posY == nil then p.posY = 0 end
	return p
end


local function remortApplySavedPos(currentPlace, saved)
	-- v16 target is the outer full-screen RemortList FormSafe.
	-- Convert it to a normal LOW placement, then apply saved offset.
	local p = stablePlacement(currentPlace)
	if not p then
		return nil
	end
	if type(saved) == "table" then
		if saved.posX ~= nil then p.posX = saved.posX end
		if saved.posY ~= nil then p.posY = saved.posY end
	end
	-- Verified by WidgetTreeLogger_Remort_v1: converting the full-screen FormSafe
	-- to LOW alignment preserved sizeX=0, producing a zero-width clipping root.
	-- The native opened RemortList root is 500 units wide.
	p.sizeX = 500
	return p
end

local function remortConfigFromPlacement(place)
	return {
		posX = place and place.posX or 0,
		posY = place and place.posY or 0
	}
end

local function isTableEmpty(t)
	if type(t) ~= "table" then
		return true
	end
	for _ in pairs(t) do
		return false
	end
	return true
end

local function loadConfig()
	if config ~= nil then
		return
	end
	config = {}
	if userMods and userMods.GetGlobalConfigSection then
		local loaded = safeCall("GetGlobalConfigSection", function()
			return userMods.GetGlobalConfigSection(CONFIG_SECTION)
		end)
		if type(loaded) == "table" then
			config = loaded
		end
	end

	-- One-time migration from the old shared mover section.
	-- The bank entry is intentionally discarded: BankColumns v1 owns it now.
	if isTableEmpty(config) and userMods and userMods.GetGlobalConfigSection then
		local legacy = safeCall("GetGlobalConfigSection legacy", function()
			return userMods.GetGlobalConfigSection(LEGACY_CONFIG_SECTION)
		end)
		if type(legacy) == "table" and not isTableEmpty(legacy) then
			config = {}
			for key, value in pairs(legacy) do
				if key ~= "bank" then config[key] = value end
			end
			log("MIGRATED legacy bag/remort positions")
			if userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection then
				safeCall("SetGlobalConfigSection migrate legacy", function()
					userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection(CONFIG_SECTION, config)
				end)
			end
		end
	end

	-- Migration: copy old per-character positions into account-wide storage once.
	if isTableEmpty(config) and userMods and userMods.GetAvatarConfigSection then
		local loadedAvatar = safeCall("GetAvatarConfigSection migrate", function()
			return userMods.GetAvatarConfigSection(LEGACY_CONFIG_SECTION)
		end)
		if type(loadedAvatar) == "table" and not isTableEmpty(loadedAvatar) then
			config = {}
			for key, value in pairs(loadedAvatar) do
				if key ~= "bank" then config[key] = value end
			end
			log("MIGRATED avatar bag/remort positions to global")
			if userMods and userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection then
				safeCall("SetGlobalConfigSection migrate avatar", function()
					userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection(CONFIG_SECTION, config)
				end)
			end
		end
	end

	-- Never retain a bank entry in the mover-owned section.
	config.bank = nil
end

local function saveConfig()
	loadConfig()
	if userMods and userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection then
		safeCall("SetGlobalConfigSection", function()
			userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection(CONFIG_SECTION, config)
		end)
	elseif userMods and userMods.SetAvatarConfigSection then
		safeCall("SetAvatarConfigSection fallback", function()
			userMods.SetAvatarConfigSection(CONFIG_SECTION, config)
		end)
	end
end

local function applySavedPlacement(key, widget, force)
	loadConfig()
	local saved = config[key]
	if type(saved) == "table" and widget then
		-- Apply only once per visible/open cycle unless explicitly forced by drag finish.
		-- Constant re-applying made RemortList fight AdvancedRemortList and visually jump
		-- between two remembered positions.
		if force or not appliedOnShow[key] then
			setPlacement(widget, key == "remort" and remortApplySavedPos(getPlacement(widget), saved) or stablePlacement(saved))
			appliedOnShow[key] = true
			log("APPLIED " .. windows[key].title)
		end
	end
end

local function getScreen()
	return safeCall("GetPosConverterParams", function()
		if common and common.GetPosConverterParams then
			return common.GetPosConverterParams()
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function scaleFromReal()
	local screen = getScreen()
	if screen and screen.realSizeX and screen.realSizeY and screen.realSizeX ~= 0 and screen.realSizeY ~= 0 then
		return screen.fullVirtualSizeX / screen.realSizeX, screen.fullVirtualSizeY / screen.realSizeY
	end
	return 1, 1
end

local function deltaForPlacement(dx, dy, place)
	local sx, sy = scaleFromReal()
	local useRealX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW_ABS and place and place.alignX == WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW_ABS
	local useRealY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW_ABS and place and place.alignY == WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW_ABS
	return useRealX and dx or dx * sx, useRealY and dy or dy * sy
end

local function movedPlacement(key, startPlace, dx, dy)
	local place = copyPlacement(startPlace)
	if not place then
		return nil
	end

	local vx, vy = deltaForPlacement(dx, dy, place)
	vx = math.floor(vx)
	vy = math.floor(vy)

	if WIDGET_ALIGN_HIGH and place.alignX == WIDGET_ALIGN_HIGH then
		place.highPosX = (place.highPosX or 0) - vx
	elseif WIDGET_ALIGN_BOTH and place.alignX == WIDGET_ALIGN_BOTH then
		place.posX = (place.posX or 0) + vx
		place.highPosX = (place.highPosX or 0) - vx
	else
		place.posX = (place.posX or 0) + vx
	end

	if WIDGET_ALIGN_HIGH and place.alignY == WIDGET_ALIGN_HIGH then
		place.highPosY = (place.highPosY or 0) - vy
	elseif WIDGET_ALIGN_BOTH and place.alignY == WIDGET_ALIGN_BOTH then
		place.posY = (place.posY or 0) + vy
		place.highPosY = (place.highPosY or 0) - vy
	else
		place.posY = (place.posY or 0) + vy
	end

	-- v16: remort target is outer root FormSafe, so it uses the same LOW movement
	-- model as normal windows. The inner visible RemortList panel is never touched.
	return stablePlacement(place)
end

local function getRealRect(widget)
	return safeCall("GetRealRect", function()
		if widget and widget.GetRealRect then
			return widget:GetRealRect()
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function lowPlacementFromRealRect(widget, fallbackPlace)
	local rect = getRealRect(widget)
	local base = copyPlacement(fallbackPlace) or getPlacement(widget) or {}
	if type(rect) ~= "table" or rect.x1 == nil or rect.y1 == nil or rect.x2 == nil or rect.y2 == nil then
		return stablePlacement(base)
	end
	local sx, sy = scaleFromReal()
	base.alignX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or base.alignX
	base.alignY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or base.alignY
	base.posX = math.floor(rect.x1 * sx)
	base.posY = math.floor(rect.y1 * sy)
	base.highPosX = 0
	base.highPosY = 0
	if base.sizeX == nil or base.sizeX == 0 then
		base.sizeX = math.floor((rect.x2 - rect.x1) * sx)
	end
	if base.sizeY == nil or base.sizeY == 0 then
		base.sizeY = math.floor((rect.y2 - rect.y1) * sy)
	end
	return base
end

function showWidget(widget, visible)
	safeCall("Show", function()
		if widget and widget.Show then
			widget:Show(visible)
		end
	end)
end

local function syncHandle(key)
	local info = windows[key]
	local handle = handles[key]
	if not handle then
		return
	end
	if key == "remort" and not remortListReady then
		showWidget(handle, false)
		return
	end
	local window = getDisplayWindow(info)
	if not window then
		showWidget(handle, false)
		return
	end

	if key == "remort" then
		expandRemortVisualHeight()
		window = getDisplayWindow(info) or window
	end

	-- RemortList.RemortList may report IsVisible=false even when its children are drawn.
	-- For that window, trust GetRealRect instead of IsVisible.
	if key ~= "remort" and not isWidgetVisible(window) then
		showWidget(handle, false)
		return
	end

	local rect = getRealRect(window)
	if type(rect) ~= "table" or not rect.x1 or not rect.y1 or not rect.x2 or not rect.y2 then
		showWidget(handle, false)
		return
	end

	local sx, sy = scaleFromReal()
	local windowWidth = math.max(0, rect.x2 - rect.x1)
	local x = rect.x1 + math.max(8, (windowWidth - info.handleWidth) / 2)
	local y = rect.y1 + info.offsetY
	if key == "remort" then
		-- Put the invisible drag strip exactly on the visible title plate.
		x = rect.x1 + math.max(40, (windowWidth - info.handleWidth) / 2)
		y = rect.y1 - 12
	end
	local place = getPlacement(handle)
	if place then
		place.alignX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW
		place.alignY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW
		place.posX = math.floor(x * sx)
		place.posY = math.floor(y * sy)
		place.sizeX = math.floor(info.handleWidth * sx)
		place.sizeY = math.floor(info.handleHeight * sy)
		setPlacement(handle, place)
	end
	showWidget(handle, true)
	if not handleWasVisible[key] then
		handleWasVisible[key] = true
		log("HANDLE_READY " .. info.title .. " x=" .. tostring(math.floor(x)) .. " y=" .. tostring(math.floor(y)))
	end
end

local function syncAllHandles()
	for key in pairs(windows) do
		syncHandle(key)
	end
end

local function registerHandle(key)
	local info = windows[key]
	local handle = handles[key]
	if not handle or registeredIds[key] then
		return
	end
	local window = getWindow(info)
	if window then
		if key ~= "remort" then
			local p = getPlacement(window)
			if p then
				setPlacement(window, stablePlacement(p))
			end
			applySavedPlacement(key, window, false)
		else
			-- Do not touch RemortList during registration. The form exists even when the
			-- window is not opened, and applying saved placement here produced a second
			-- visible state when the game later drew the real window.
		end
	end
	local state = safeCall("DNDGetState " .. key, function()
		if handle.DNDGetState then
			return handle:DNDGetState()
		end
		return DND_STATE_NOT_REGISTERED
	end)
	if state ~= nil and DND_STATE_NOT_REGISTERED and state ~= DND_STATE_NOT_REGISTERED then
		log("SKIP_REGISTER " .. info.title .. " state=" .. tostring(state))
		return
	end
	local id = safeCall("DNDRegisterGeneric " .. key, function()
		if handle.DNDRegisterGeneric then
			return handle:DNDRegisterGeneric(true)
		end
		return nil
	end)
	if id then
		registeredIds[key] = id
		idToKey[id] = key
		log("REGISTERED " .. info.title .. " overlayId=" .. tostring(id))
	end
end

local function registerAll()
	for key in pairs(windows) do
		registerHandle(key)
	end
	syncAllHandles()
end

local function OnDndPick(params)
	local key = params and idToKey[params.srcId]
	if not key then
		return
	end
	local window = getWindow(windows[key])
	if not window then
		return
	end
	local place = getPlacement(window)
	if not place then
		return
	end
	-- All real targets, including the outer RemortList FormSafe, are moved as LOW-anchored containers.
	-- The visible inner RemortList panel is not touched, so it cannot slide inside its mask.
	-- v28fix: for remort the root is a full-screen FormSafe whose GetRealRect returns
	-- the entire screen (0,0,W,H), so lowPlacementFromRealRect produces posX=0,posY=0
	-- and setPlacement snaps the window to the corner on every drag-pick.
	-- Use the visible display window (inner RemortList) for the real-rect reading,
	-- then apply those coords to the root FormSafe placement.
	local startPlace
	if key == "remort" then
		local displayWindow = getDisplayWindow(windows[key])
		local displayRect = displayWindow and getRealRect(displayWindow)
		if type(displayRect) == "table" and displayRect.x1 ~= nil then
			local sx, sy = scaleFromReal()
			local p = stablePlacement(place)
			p.posX = math.floor(displayRect.x1 * sx)
			p.posY = math.floor(displayRect.y1 * sy)
			p.sizeX = 500
			p.sizeY = place.sizeY or 0
			startPlace = p
			setPlacement(window, startPlace)
			log("DRAG_ANCHOR_REMORT posX=" .. tostring(p.posX) .. " posY=" .. tostring(p.posY))
		else
			startPlace = stablePlacement(place)
		end
	else
		startPlace = lowPlacementFromRealRect(window, place)
		if startPlace then
			setPlacement(window, startPlace)
		else
			startPlace = stablePlacement(place)
		end
	end
	activeDrag = {
		key = key,
		window = window,
		startX = params.posX or 0,
		startY = params.posY or 0,
		startPlace = copyPlacement(startPlace),
		lastPlace = copyPlacement(startPlace),
		primed = false
	}
	if params.srcWidget and params.srcWidget.DNDConfirmPickAttempt then
		params.srcWidget:DNDConfirmPickAttempt()
	end
	log("DRAG_START " .. windows[key].title)
end

local function updateDrag(params)
	if not activeDrag or not params then
		return
	end
	if params.posX == nil or params.posY == nil then
		return
	end
	local key = activeDrag.key
	local window = getWindow(windows[key]) or activeDrag.window

	-- Different Allods UI builds may report posX/posY in different coordinate spaces
	-- between PICK and first DRAG_TO.  If we use the PICK coordinates directly,
	-- the first click can become a huge negative dx and the Remort window flies left.
	-- Therefore the first DRAG_TO/DROP coordinate only arms the drag; real movement
	-- starts from the next coordinate in the same coordinate space.
	if not activeDrag.primed then
		activeDrag.startX = params.posX or 0
		activeDrag.startY = params.posY or 0
		activeDrag.primed = true
		activeDrag.lastPlace = copyPlacement(activeDrag.startPlace)
		return
	end

	local dx = (params.posX or activeDrag.startX) - activeDrag.startX
	local dy = (params.posY or activeDrag.startY) - activeDrag.startY

	-- Guard against broken DND coordinates: a normal drag should not move a window
	-- by more than a full screen in one event.  This prevents instant jumps.
	if math.abs(dx) > 4000 or math.abs(dy) > 4000 then
		log("IGNORED_BAD_DND_DELTA " .. windows[key].title .. " dx=" .. tostring(dx) .. " dy=" .. tostring(dy))
		return
	end

	local place = movedPlacement(key, activeDrag.startPlace, dx, dy)
	if window and place then
		setPlacement(window, place)
		activeDrag.lastPlace = copyPlacement(place)
		-- Do not move the invisible handle while DND is active: moving the source
		-- widget during drag can feed back into DND and cause sideways jumps.
	end
end

local function OnDndDragTo(params)
	if activeDrag and params and idToKey[params.srcId] == activeDrag.key then
		updateDrag(params)
	end
end

local function finishDrag(params, cancelled)
	if not activeDrag then
		return
	end
	local key = activeDrag.key
	local window = getWindow(windows[key]) or activeDrag.window
	if cancelled then
		setPlacement(window, activeDrag.startPlace)
	else
		updateDrag(params or {})
		local place = activeDrag.lastPlace or getPlacement(window)
		if place then
			setPlacement(window, place)
			appliedOnShow[key] = true
			loadConfig()
			config[key] = key == "remort" and remortConfigFromPlacement(place) or stablePlacement(place)
			saveConfig()
			log("SAVED " .. windows[key].title .. " x=" .. tostring(place.posX) .. " y=" .. tostring(place.posY))
		end
		if params and params.srcWidget and params.srcWidget.DNDConfirmDropAttempt then
			params.srcWidget:DNDConfirmDropAttempt()
		end
	end
	log((cancelled and "DRAG_CANCEL " or "DRAG_FINISH ") .. windows[key].title)
	activeDrag = nil
	syncHandle(key)
end

local function OnDndDrop(params)
	if activeDrag and params and idToKey[params.srcId] == activeDrag.key then
		finishDrag(params, false)
	end
end

local function OnDndCancel(params)
	if activeDrag and (not params or idToKey[params.srcId] == activeDrag.key) then
		finishDrag(params, true)
	end
end

local function enforceSavedPlacements()
	-- v23: no constant enforcement. v22 was re-applying saved Remort placement
	-- every second, while the game/AdvancedRemortList also refreshed the window.
	-- That made two visual states and a shifting ghost.
	-- Apply once after startup only if there is an existing saved position.
	if activeDrag or remortAppliedAtBoot or not remortListReady then
		return
	end
	loadConfig()
	if type(config.remort) ~= "table" then
		return
	end
	local root = getWindow(windows.remort)
	if root then
		applySavedPlacement("remort", root, true)
		remortAppliedAtBoot = true
		remortLastApplySecond = seconds
		log("REMORT_APPLY_ONCE")
	end
end

local function enableShowNotification(key)
	local window = getWindow(windows[key])
	if window and window.SetOnShowNotification then
		safeCall("SetOnShowNotification " .. key, function()
			window:SetOnShowNotification(true)
		end)
	end
end

local function OnWidgetShowChanged(params)
	if activeDrag then
		return
	end
	for key, info in pairs(windows) do
		local window = getWindow(info)
		if window and params and params.widget == window then
			if key == "remort" and not remortListReady then
				return
			end
			-- v60: apply saved placement for all windows including remort.
			-- The flicker risk from v51's CENTER scheme is gone; we only touch sizeY,
			-- so applying posX/posY here is safe.
			appliedOnShow[key] = false
			if key == "remort" then
				-- v22fix: do NOT reset remortAppliedAtBoot here.
				-- Resetting it caused shake: expandRemortVisualHeight() re-triggers
				-- WIDGET_SHOW_CHANGED which fires applySavedPlacement again.
				-- Use a cooldown: skip if we applied within last 2 seconds.
				if seconds - remortLastApplySecond < 2 then
					syncHandle(key)
					log("SHOW_SKIP_COOLDOWN " .. info.title)
					return
				end
				remortLastApplySecond = seconds
				remortAppliedAtBoot = true
			end
			applySavedPlacement(key, window, false)
			syncHandle(key)
			log("SHOW_APPLY " .. info.title)
			return
		end
	end
end

local function OnSecondTimer()
	seconds = seconds + 1
	if remortListReady and not labVisitsKnown and seconds >= labNextRetrySecond then
		labNextRetrySecond = seconds + 3
		if updateCurrentLabVisits() then
			applyLabLabels()
		end
	end
	if seconds <= REGISTER_RETRY_SECONDS then
		registerAll()
	else
		syncAllHandles()
	end
	if remortListReady then
		expandRemortVisualHeight()
		enforceSavedPlacements()
	end
	syncAllHandles()
end

local function OnRemortListGained()
	local isFirstCall = not remortListReady
	remortListReady = true
	-- Without AdvancedRemortList bytecode, explicitly show the verified native form tree.
	local root = getWindow(windows.remort)
	local panel = getDisplayWindow(windows.remort)
	local content = getByPath("RemortList", { "RemortList", "Content" })
	-- v25fix: set cooldown BEFORE showWidget to prevent OnWidgetShowChanged from
	-- applying saved position a second time right after we apply it below.
	-- showWidget triggers EVENT_WIDGET_SHOW_CHANGED -> OnWidgetShowChanged which
	-- called applySavedPlacement, then we called it again below: two jumps on open.
	-- v26fix: apply saved position BEFORE showWidget+expand so the window
	-- never appears at the default/expanded position first.
	-- Old order: show -> expand(moves window) -> apply = visible jump.
	-- New order: apply -> show -> expand = no jump.
	if isFirstCall then
		remortLastApplySecond = seconds
		-- v27: log what getPlacement returns before showWidget so we can
		-- see whether the hidden FormSafe has CENTER alignment (meaning
		-- posX/posY would be in the wrong coordinate system).
		local dbgPlace = getPlacement(root)
		if dbgPlace then
			log("REMORT_PRE_SHOW_PLACE alignX=" .. tostring(dbgPlace.alignX) ..
				" alignY=" .. tostring(dbgPlace.alignY) ..
				" posX=" .. tostring(dbgPlace.posX) ..
				" posY=" .. tostring(dbgPlace.posY) ..
				" sizeX=" .. tostring(dbgPlace.sizeX) ..
				" sizeY=" .. tostring(dbgPlace.sizeY))
		else
			log("REMORT_PRE_SHOW_PLACE nil")
		end
		applySavedPlacement("remort", root, true)
		remortAppliedAtBoot = true
		local dbgAfter = getPlacement(root)
		if dbgAfter then
			log("REMORT_POST_APPLY_PLACE alignX=" .. tostring(dbgAfter.alignX) ..
				" posX=" .. tostring(dbgAfter.posX) ..
				" posY=" .. tostring(dbgAfter.posY) ..
				" sizeX=" .. tostring(dbgAfter.sizeX) ..
				" sizeY=" .. tostring(dbgAfter.sizeY))
		end
		log("REMORT_APPLY_BEFORE_SHOW")
	end
	showWidget(root, true)
	showWidget(panel, true)
	showWidget(content, true)
	log("REMORT_NATIVE_SHOW_V111 root=" .. tostring(root ~= nil) ..
		" panel=" .. tostring(panel ~= nil) .. " content=" .. tostring(content ~= nil))
	-- Expand immediately when the list appears instead of waiting for the next second timer.
	expandRemortVisualHeight()
	local dbgExpand = getPlacement(root)
	if dbgExpand then
		log("REMORT_POST_EXPAND_PLACE alignX=" .. tostring(dbgExpand.alignX) ..
			" posX=" .. tostring(dbgExpand.posX) ..
			" posY=" .. tostring(dbgExpand.posY) ..
			" sizeX=" .. tostring(dbgExpand.sizeX) ..
			" sizeY=" .. tostring(dbgExpand.sizeY))
	end
	updateCurrentLabVisits()
	applyLabLabels()
	-- Only log repeat calls (position already applied above on first call).
	local root = getWindow(windows.remort)
	if not isFirstCall then
		log("REMORT_SKIP_APPLY_REPEAT_CALL")
	else
		log("REMORT_APPLY_FIRST_CALL")
	end
	syncHandle("remort")
end

local function Init()
	log("START v19 window mover")
	loadConfig()
	loadLabConfig()
	resetOldLabWeekData()
	-- Remort/matchMaking work is delayed until EVENT_REMORT_LIST_GAINED.
	for key, info in pairs(windows) do
		if info.handleWidgetName then
			handles[key] = mainForm and mainForm:GetChildChecked(info.handleWidgetName, false)
			showWidget(handles[key], false)
		end
	end
	registerAll()
	for key in pairs(windows) do
		enableShowNotification(key)
	end
	if common and common.RegisterEventHandler then
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnSecondTimer, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")

		common.RegisterEventHandler(syncAllHandles, "EVENT_POS_CONVERTER_CHANGED")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnWidgetShowChanged, "EVENT_WIDGET_SHOW_CHANGED")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnRemortListGained, "EVENT_REMORT_LIST_GAINED")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnLabVisitsChanged, "EVENT_MATCH_MAKING_EVENTS_CHANGED")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnLabVisitsChanged, "EVENT_MATCH_MAKING_EVENT_VISITS_CHANGED")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnLabVisitsChanged, "EVENT_LFG_DESTINATION_VISITS_CHANGED")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnDndPick, "EVENT_DND_PICK_ATTEMPT")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnDndDragTo, "EVENT_DND_DRAG_TO")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnDndDrop, "EVENT_DND_DROP_ATTEMPT")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnDndCancel, "EVENT_DND_DRAG_CANCELLED")
	end
	log("READY v19 centered icons and runtime random assignment")
	log("END v12 window mover")
end

if avatar and avatar.IsExist and avatar.IsExist() then
	Init()
else
	if common and common.RegisterEventHandler then
		common.RegisterEventHandler(Init, "EVENT_AVATAR_CREATED")
	else
		Init()
	end
end

local ADDON_NAME = "ChatGPT_AutoRez_v15"
local TARGET_ZONE = "Maze_KHD"

local RESPAWN_INITIAL_DELAY_MS = 350
local RESPAWN_RETRY_INTERVAL_MS = 1000
local MAX_RESPAWN_ATTEMPTS = 3
local FINAL_ATTEMPT_GRACE_MS = 2500
local HIDE_INTERVAL_MS = 100
local POST_ALIVE_HIDE_MS = 3000
local MAX_CYCLE_TIME_MS = 15000

local currentZone = ""
local frameRegistered = false
local cycleActive = false
local respawnAttempts = 0
local nextRespawnTime = nil
local nextHideTime = nil
local postAliveHideUntil = nil
local finalAttemptDeadline = nil
local cycleDeadline = nil
local lastAnnouncedZoneMessage = nil
local startupAnnounceAttempts = 0
local startupAnnounceDone = false
local startupRetryRegistered = false

local function log(msg)
	common.LogInfo(ADDON_NAME, tostring(msg))
end

local function safeFromWString(value)
	if value == nil then
		return ""
	end

	local ok, result = pcall(function()
		return userMods.FromWString(value)
	end)
	if ok and result then
		return result
	end

	return ""
end

local function getDeathDialog()
	local smf = stateMainForm
	if not smf then
		return nil
	end

	local okWidget, deathWidget = pcall(function()
		return smf:GetChildUnchecked("Death", false)
	end)
	if not okWidget then
		return nil
	end

	return deathWidget
end

local function setDeathDialogVisible(visible)
	local deathWidget = getDeathDialog()
	if not deathWidget then
		return false
	end

	local ok = pcall(function()
		deathWidget:Show(visible)
	end)
	return ok
end

local function hideDeathDialog()
	return setDeathDialogVisible(false)
end

local function showDeathDialog()
	return setDeathDialogVisible(true)
end

local function stopFrameHandler()
	if frameRegistered then
		common.UnRegisterFrameHandler()
		frameRegistered = false
	end
end

local function clearCycle()
	cycleActive = false
	respawnAttempts = 0
	nextRespawnTime = nil
	nextHideTime = nil
	postAliveHideUntil = nil
	finalAttemptDeadline = nil
	cycleDeadline = nil
	stopFrameHandler()
end

local function ensureFrameHandler(onFrame)
	if not frameRegistered then
		common.RegisterFrameHandler(onFrame, false)
		frameRegistered = true
	end
end

local onFrame

local function beginPostAliveCleanup(now)
	if not cycleActive then
		return
	end

	nextRespawnTime = nil
	finalAttemptDeadline = nil
	nextHideTime = now
	postAliveHideUntil = now + POST_ALIVE_HIDE_MS
	cycleDeadline = nil
	hideDeathDialog()
	ensureFrameHandler(onFrame)
end

local function beginDeathCycle()
	if currentZone ~= TARGET_ZONE then
		return
	end

	-- Ignore duplicate death notifications for the same active death cycle.
	-- If the avatar dies again during post-alive cleanup, start a fresh cycle.
	if cycleActive and postAliveHideUntil == nil then
		return
	end

	local now = common.GetAbsTimeMs()
	cycleActive = true
	respawnAttempts = 0
	nextRespawnTime = now + RESPAWN_INITIAL_DELAY_MS
	nextHideTime = now
	postAliveHideUntil = nil
	finalAttemptDeadline = nil
	cycleDeadline = now + MAX_CYCLE_TIME_MS

	hideDeathDialog()
	ensureFrameHandler(onFrame)
end

local function finishFailedCycle()
	showDeathDialog()
	clearCycle()
end

onFrame = function()
	if not cycleActive then
		stopFrameHandler()
		return
	end

	if currentZone ~= TARGET_ZONE then
		clearCycle()
		return
	end

	local now = common.GetAbsTimeMs()
	local alive = avatar.IsAlive()

	if nextHideTime == nil or now >= nextHideTime then
		hideDeathDialog()
		nextHideTime = now + HIDE_INTERVAL_MS
	end

	if alive then
		if postAliveHideUntil == nil then
			beginPostAliveCleanup(now)
		end

		if postAliveHideUntil ~= nil and now >= postAliveHideUntil then
			clearCycle()
		end
		return
	end

	postAliveHideUntil = nil

	if respawnAttempts < MAX_RESPAWN_ATTEMPTS and
		nextRespawnTime ~= nil and now >= nextRespawnTime then
		respawnAttempts = respawnAttempts + 1
		pcall(function()
			avatar.Respawn()
		end)

		-- The game can recreate the death dialog immediately after Respawn().
		hideDeathDialog()
		nextHideTime = now

		if respawnAttempts >= MAX_RESPAWN_ATTEMPTS then
			nextRespawnTime = nil
			finalAttemptDeadline = now + FINAL_ATTEMPT_GRACE_MS
		else
			nextRespawnTime = now + RESPAWN_RETRY_INTERVAL_MS
		end
	end

	if finalAttemptDeadline ~= nil and now >= finalAttemptDeadline then
		finishFailedCycle()
		return
	end

	if cycleDeadline ~= nil and now >= cycleDeadline then
		finishFailedCycle()
	end
end

local function onAliveChanged(params)
	if not params then
		return
	end

	if params.alive == false and currentZone == TARGET_ZONE then
		log("DEAD")
		beginDeathCycle()
	elseif params.alive == true and currentZone == TARGET_ZONE and cycleActive then
		log("ALIVE")
		beginPostAliveCleanup(common.GetAbsTimeMs())
	end
end

local function updateCurrentZone(forceAnnounce)
	local ok, zoneInfo = pcall(function()
		return cartographer.GetCurrentZoneInfo()
	end)
	if not ok or not zoneInfo then
		currentZone = ""
		clearCycle()
		return
	end

	currentZone = zoneInfo.sysZoneName or ""

	local allod = safeFromWString(zoneInfo.allod)
	local zone = safeFromWString(zoneInfo.zoneName)
	local sub = safeFromWString(zoneInfo.subZoneName)
	local msg = "allod: " .. allod ..
		" | zone: " .. zone ..
		(sub ~= "" and " (" .. sub .. ")" or "") ..
		" | sys: " .. currentZone
	if (zone ~= "" or currentZone ~= "") and (forceAnnounce or msg ~= lastAnnouncedZoneMessage) then
		lastAnnouncedZoneMessage = msg
		userMods.SendSelfChatMessage(userMods.ToWString(msg), "notice")
	end

	if currentZone ~= TARGET_ZONE then
		clearCycle()
	elseif not avatar.IsAlive() then
		beginDeathCycle()
	end
end


local function retryStartupAnnounce()
	if startupAnnounceDone then
		common.UnRegisterEventHandler(retryStartupAnnounce, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
		startupRetryRegistered = false
		return
	end

	startupAnnounceAttempts = startupAnnounceAttempts + 1
	updateCurrentZone(true)
	if lastAnnouncedZoneMessage ~= nil or startupAnnounceAttempts >= 8 then
		startupAnnounceDone = true
		common.UnRegisterEventHandler(retryStartupAnnounce, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
		startupRetryRegistered = false
	end
end

local function onZoneChanged()
	updateCurrentZone(false)
end

local function onAvatarCreated()
	updateCurrentZone(true)
	if lastAnnouncedZoneMessage == nil and not startupAnnounceDone and not startupRetryRegistered then
		common.RegisterEventHandler(retryStartupAnnounce, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
		startupRetryRegistered = true
	end
end

log("START v15")
common.RegisterEventHandler(onAvatarCreated, "EVENT_AVATAR_CREATED")
common.RegisterEventHandler(onAliveChanged, "EVENT_AVATAR_ALIVE_CHANGED")
common.RegisterEventHandler(onZoneChanged, "EVENT_AVATAR_CLIENT_ZONE_CHANGED")
onAvatarCreated()
log("END v15")

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<UIAddon>
	<Name>ChatGPT_AutoSkipCutscenes</Name>
	<AutoStart>true</AutoStart>
	<ScriptFileRefs>
		<Item href="IgnoreQuests.txt"/>
		<Item href="ScriptMain.lua"/>
	</ScriptFileRefs>
	<addon_name>ChatGPT_AutoSkipCutscenes</addon_name>
	<addon_date>1781481082</addon_date>
	<addon_link>https://alloder.pro/files/file/446-autoskipcutscenes/</addon_link>
<localizedNameFileRef href="name.txt"/><localizedDescFileRef href="desc.txt"/><userAddonInfo><name href="name.txt"/><description href="desc.txt"/><sourceLink href="link.txt"/><supportLink href="link.txt"/><author>Slashuur</author><version>7</version><buildTime>1781481082</buildTime></userAddonInfo></UIAddon>

common.LogInfo("ChatGPT_AutoSkipCutscenes", "START")

local function NormalizeQuestName(value)
    if type(value) ~= "string" then
        return nil
    end

    -- Normalize both CP1251 and UTF-8 non-breaking spaces, then trim/collapse ASCII whitespace.
    value = string.gsub(value, "\194\160", " ")
    value = string.gsub(value, "\160", " ")
    value = string.gsub(value, "^%s+", "")
    value = string.gsub(value, "%s+$", "")
    value = string.gsub(value, "%s+", " ")
    return value
end

local ignoreQuestsMap = {}
local ignoreQuestList = ChatGPTAutoSkipCutscenesIgnoreQuests or {}
for _, questName in pairs(ignoreQuestList) do
    local normalizedName = NormalizeQuestName(questName)
    if normalizedName and normalizedName ~= "" then
        ignoreQuestsMap[normalizedName] = true
    end
end

local canSkipCached = false
local questHandlerRegistered = false
local currentBuffFilter = nil

local function RefreshCanSkip()
    local canSkip = true
    local book = avatar.GetQuestBook()

    if book then
        for _, questId in pairs(book) do
            local info = avatar.GetQuestInfo(questId)
            if info and info.name then
                local name = userMods.FromWString(info.name:ToWString())
                local normalizedName = NormalizeQuestName(name)
                if normalizedName and ignoreQuestsMap[normalizedName] then
                    canSkip = false
                    break
                end
            end
        end
    end

    canSkipCached = canSkip
end

local function SafeRefreshCanSkip()
    local ok = pcall(RefreshCanSkip)
    if not ok then
        canSkipCached = false
        common.LogInfo("ChatGPT_AutoSkipCutscenes", "quest cache refresh failed")
    end
end

local function OnQuestBookChanged(params)
    SafeRefreshCanSkip()
end

local function OnBuffAdded(params)
    if not canSkipCached or not params or not params.buffId then
        return
    end

    local buffInfo = object.GetBuffInfo(params.buffId)
    if buffInfo and buffInfo.groups and buffInfo.groups.cutScene then
        object.RemoveBuff(params.buffId)
        userMods.SendSelfChatMessage(userMods.ToWString("Cutscene skipped!"), "notice")
    end
end

local function Init()
    local avatarId = avatar.GetId()
    if not avatarId then
        return
    end

    if not questHandlerRegistered then
        common.RegisterEventHandler(OnQuestBookChanged, "EVENT_QUEST_BOOK_CHANGED")
        questHandlerRegistered = true
    end

    if currentBuffFilter then
        common.UnRegisterEventHandler(OnBuffAdded, "EVENT_OBJECT_BUFF_ADDED", currentBuffFilter)
        currentBuffFilter = nil
    end

    SafeRefreshCanSkip()

    local newBuffFilter = { objectId = avatarId }
    common.RegisterEventHandler(OnBuffAdded, "EVENT_OBJECT_BUFF_ADDED", newBuffFilter)
    currentBuffFilter = newBuffFilter
end

common.RegisterEventHandler(Init, "EVENT_AVATAR_CREATED")
if avatar.IsExist() then
    Init()
end

common.LogInfo("ChatGPT_AutoSkipCutscenes", "END")
