</UIAddon>
Диагностика сумки для безопасной настройки объединения, использования и продажи предметов.

local ADDON_TAG = "[ChatGPT_BagAutomation_v9]"

local bagWidget = nil
local bagWidgetInstanceId = nil
local scanNumber = 0
local persistentIdCache = {}
local waitingForBagWidget = false
local mergeTimerRegistered = false
local mergeActive = false
local pendingMerge = nil
local useActive = false
local useTimerRegistered = false
local processAutoUse
local scanBag
local attemptedUseRules = {}
local pendingAutoUse = nil
local repeatNoProgress = {}
local postUseMerge = false
local autoUseChangedBag = false
local manualUseButton = mainForm:GetChildChecked("ManualUseButton", false)
local manualUseRefreshActive = false
local manualUseRefreshAttempts = 0
local refreshManualUseButton
local inventoryRescanTimerRegistered = false
local inventoryRescanPending = false
local inventoryRescanTicks = 0
local processInventoryRescan

local NORMAL_USE_ORDER = {
	"49C06E119C1FD50365091599CEF50490",
	"78CC193114B246C1C8B0CD642CFA084D",
	"05A0E07511B4DB35044DD5E948E2CBE4",
}

local AUTO_USE_RULES = {
	["88C9979327AFEA5F5FA5086C47CF4C4E"] = {
		name = "Sculptor Shard",
		minOverallCount = 1,
		useWholeStack = true,
		repeatUntilGone = true,
	},
	["0B8F0ABCB8532A0A69B740AB920D10AE"] = {
		name = "Oligarchs Collection Coin",
		minOverallCount = 1,
		useWholeStack = true,
		repeatUntilGone = true,
	},
	["79058ADC77AB1D3643AAEB4E1ACC7F38"] = {
		name = "Handful of Minted Coins",
		minOverallCount = 1,
		useOverallCount = true,
		repeatUntilGone = true,
	},
	["9705F598C32D873060D0DC9BF10B717D"] = {
		name = "Quest Coin Handful",
		minOverallCount = 1,
		useOverallCount = true,
		repeatUntilGone = true,
	},
	["49C06E119C1FD50365091599CEF50490"] = {
		name = "Victory Reward",
		minOverallCount = 1,
		manualOnly = true,
		buttonLabel = "USE",
	},
	["78CC193114B246C1C8B0CD642CFA084D"] = {
		name = "Favorite Reward",
		minOverallCount = 1,
		manualOnly = true,
		buttonLabel = "USE",
	},
	["05A0E07511B4DB35044DD5E948E2CBE4"] = {
		name = "Confrontation Coin Bag",
		minOverallCount = 1,
		manualOnly = true,
		forceManual = true,
		useChoiceAction = true,
		buttonLabel = "USE",
	},
}

local function log(message)
	common.LogInfo(ADDON_TAG, tostring(message))
end

local function fromWString(value)
	if value == nil then
		return ""
	end
	return userMods.FromWString(value)
end

local function boolText(value)
	return value and "yes" or "no"
end

local function shortText(value)
	value = tostring(value or "")
	if string.len(value) > 120 then
		return string.sub(value, 1, 120)
	end
	return value
end

local function safePersistentId(itemId)
	local resourceId = itemLib.GetResourceId(itemId)
	if resourceId == nil then
		return "nil"
	end

	local instanceId = resourceId:GetInstanceId()
	if instanceId ~= nil then
		local cached = persistentIdCache[instanceId]
		if cached ~= nil then
			return cached
		end
	end

	local persistentId = userMods.GetResourcePersistentId(resourceId)
	local result = persistentId or "unsupported"
	if instanceId ~= nil then
		persistentIdCache[instanceId] = result
	end
	return result
end

local function getUseAction(itemId)
	local usages = itemLib.GetUsagesItemInfo(itemId)
	local selected = nil

	for _, usage in pairs(usages or {}) do
		if usage.sysIndex ~= nil
			and (selected == nil or usage.sysIndex < selected.sysIndex)
		then
			selected = usage
		end
	end

	return selected
end

local function getResourceOverallCount(resourceId)
	local items = containerLib.GetItems(ITEM_CONT_INVENTORY)

	for slot = 0, containerLib.GetSize(ITEM_CONT_INVENTORY) - 1 do
		local itemId = items[slot]
		if itemId ~= nil and safePersistentId(itemId) == resourceId then
			return itemLib.GetOverallStackCount(itemId)
		end
	end

	return 0
end

local function findManualUseItem()
	local items = containerLib.GetItems(ITEM_CONT_INVENTORY)

	for _, wantedResourceId in ipairs(NORMAL_USE_ORDER) do
		for slot = 0, containerLib.GetSize(ITEM_CONT_INVENTORY) - 1 do
			local itemId = items[slot]
			if itemId ~= nil and safePersistentId(itemId) == wantedResourceId then
				local rule = AUTO_USE_RULES[wantedResourceId]
				local overallCount = itemLib.GetOverallStackCount(itemId)
				local info = itemLib.GetItemInfo(itemId)

				if rule ~= nil
					and overallCount >= rule.minOverallCount
					and info ~= nil
					and (info.isUsable or rule.forceManual)
				then
					return itemId, slot, rule
				end
			end
		end
	end

	return nil, nil, nil
end

local function updateManualUseButton()
	if manualUseButton == nil then
		return
	end

	local itemId, _, rule = findManualUseItem()
	manualUseButton:Show(itemId ~= nil)
	if itemId ~= nil then
		manualUseButton:SetVal(
			"button_label",
			userMods.ToWString(rule.buttonLabel or "USE")
		)
	end
end

local function onManualUseButton()
	local itemId, slot, rule = findManualUseItem()
	if itemId == nil then
		updateManualUseButton()
		return
	end

	manualUseButton:Show(false)
	if itemLib.IsUseItemAndTakeActions(itemId) or rule.useChoiceAction then
		local usage = getUseAction(itemId)
		local overallCount = itemLib.GetOverallStackCount(itemId)
		if usage ~= nil then
			avatar.UseItemAndTakeActions(itemId, overallCount, usage.sysIndex)
			log(
				"manual-choice"
				.. " rule=" .. rule.name
				.. " count=" .. tostring(overallCount)
				.. " action=" .. tostring(usage.sysIndex)
				.. " desc=" .. fromWString(usage.usageDesc)
			)
		else
			log("manual-choice-no-action rule=" .. rule.name)
		end
	else
		avatar.UseItem(itemId)
	end
	log(
		"manual-use"
		.. " rule=" .. rule.name
		.. " slot=" .. tostring(slot)
	)

	manualUseRefreshAttempts = 0
	if not manualUseRefreshActive then
		manualUseRefreshActive = true
		common.RegisterEventHandler(refreshManualUseButton, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
	end
end

refreshManualUseButton = function()
	manualUseRefreshAttempts = manualUseRefreshAttempts + 1
	if manualUseRefreshAttempts >= 1 then
		manualUseRefreshActive = false
		common.UnRegisterEventHandler(refreshManualUseButton, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
		if bagWidget ~= nil and bagWidget:IsVisibleEx() then
			scanBag()
		else
			updateManualUseButton()
		end
	end
end

local function getPocketLabel(pocketIndex)
	if pocketIndex == -1 then
		return "base"
	end

	local info = avatar.InventoryGetPocketInfo(pocketIndex)
	if info == nil then
		return "pocket-" .. tostring(pocketIndex)
	end

	local name = fromWString(info.name)
	if name == "" then
		name = "pocket-" .. tostring(pocketIndex)
	end
	return name
end

local function getPocketRange(pocketIndex)
	if pocketIndex == -1 then
		return 0, avatar.InventoryGetBaseBagSlotCount()
	end

	local info = avatar.InventoryGetPocketInfo(pocketIndex)
	if info == nil then
		return nil, nil
	end
	return info.firstIndex, info.size
end

local function sameBinding(sourceId, targetId)
	local source = itemLib.GetBindingInfo(sourceId)
	local target = itemLib.GetBindingInfo(targetId)

	if source == nil or target == nil then
		return source == nil and target == nil
	end

	return source.isBound == target.isBound
		and source.binding == target.binding
		and source.guildBound == target.guildBound
		and source.bindDescription == nil
		and target.bindDescription == nil
end

local function isSafeStackPair(sourceId, targetId, pocketIndex)
	if pocketIndex == 0 then
		return avatar.IsItemsStackable(sourceId, targetId)
	end

	return sameBinding(sourceId, targetId)
		and avatar.IsItemsStackable(sourceId, targetId)
end

local function describeItem(slot, itemId)
	local info = itemLib.GetItemInfo(itemId)
	local stack = itemLib.GetStackInfo(itemId)
	local temporary = itemLib.GetTemporaryInfo(itemId)
	local binding = itemLib.GetBindingInfo(itemId)
	local price = itemLib.GetPriceInfo(itemId)

	local name = info and fromWString(info.name) or "?"
	local sysName = info and info.sysName or ""
	local debugName = info and info.debugName or ""
	local count = stack and stack.count or 1
	local limit = stack and stack.limit or 1
	local remainingMs = temporary and temporary.remainingMs or -1
	local isBound = binding and binding.isBound or false
	local bindingType = binding and binding.binding or -1
	local hasBindQuestion = binding and binding.bindDescription ~= nil
	local sellPrice = price and price.sellPrice or -1
	local isUsable = info and info.isUsable or false

	log(
		"item"
		.. " slot=" .. tostring(slot)
		.. " resource=" .. safePersistentId(itemId)
		.. " count=" .. tostring(count) .. "/" .. tostring(limit)
		.. " temporaryMs=" .. tostring(remainingMs)
		.. " bound=" .. boolText(isBound)
		.. " bindingType=" .. tostring(bindingType)
		.. " bindQuestion=" .. boolText(hasBindQuestion)
		.. " usable=" .. boolText(isUsable)
		.. " sellPrice=" .. tostring(sellPrice)
		.. " sysName=" .. tostring(sysName)
		.. " debugName=" .. tostring(debugName)
		.. " name=" .. name
	)
end

local function logStackablePairs(pocketIndex, firstSlot, size, items)
	for sourceSlot = firstSlot, firstSlot + size - 1 do
		local sourceId = items[sourceSlot]
		local sourceStack = sourceId and itemLib.GetStackInfo(sourceId)

		if sourceStack and sourceStack.count < sourceStack.limit then
			for targetSlot = firstSlot, sourceSlot - 1 do
				local targetId = items[targetSlot]
				local targetStack = targetId and itemLib.GetStackInfo(targetId)

				if targetStack
					and targetStack.count < targetStack.limit
					and avatar.IsItemsStackable(sourceId, targetId)
				then
					local sourceTemporary = itemLib.GetTemporaryInfo(sourceId)
					local targetTemporary = itemLib.GetTemporaryInfo(targetId)
					local hasTemporaryItem = sourceTemporary ~= nil or targetTemporary ~= nil
					local safe = isSafeStackPair(sourceId, targetId, pocketIndex)

					log(
						"stackable"
						.. " sourceSlot=" .. tostring(sourceSlot)
						.. " targetSlot=" .. tostring(targetSlot)
						.. " temporary=" .. boolText(hasTemporaryItem)
						.. " safe=" .. boolText(safe)
					)
					break
				end
			end
		end
	end
end

local function isAutoMergePocket(pocketIndex)
	return pocketIndex == -1
		or pocketIndex == 0
		or pocketIndex == 1
end

local function scanPocket(pocketIndex, items)
	local firstSlot, size = getPocketRange(pocketIndex)
	if firstSlot == nil then
		return
	end

	log(
		"section"
		.. " pocket=" .. tostring(pocketIndex)
		.. " name=" .. getPocketLabel(pocketIndex)
		.. " firstSlot=" .. tostring(firstSlot)
		.. " size=" .. tostring(size)
	)

	for slot = firstSlot, firstSlot + size - 1 do
		local itemId = items[slot]
		if itemId ~= nil then
			describeItem(slot, itemId)
		end
	end

	logStackablePairs(pocketIndex, firstSlot, size, items)
end

local function getAutoMergeRanges()
	local ranges = {}
	local baseFirst, baseSize = getPocketRange(-1)
	table.insert(ranges, { pocketIndex = -1, firstSlot = baseFirst, size = baseSize })

	local pocketsCount = avatar.InventoryGetPocketsCount()
	for pocketIndex = 0, pocketsCount - 1 do
		if isAutoMergePocket(pocketIndex) then
			local firstSlot, size = getPocketRange(pocketIndex)
			if firstSlot ~= nil then
				table.insert(ranges, { pocketIndex = pocketIndex, firstSlot = firstSlot, size = size })
			end
		end
	end
	return ranges
end

local function findBestMergePair()
	local items = containerLib.GetItems(ITEM_CONT_INVENTORY)
	local best = nil

	for _, range in ipairs(getAutoMergeRanges()) do
		local lastSlot = range.firstSlot + range.size - 1
		for slotA = range.firstSlot, lastSlot do
			local itemA = items[slotA]
			local stackA = itemA and itemLib.GetStackInfo(itemA)

			if stackA and stackA.limit > 1 and stackA.count < stackA.limit then
				for slotB = slotA + 1, lastSlot do
					local itemB = items[slotB]
					local stackB = itemB and itemLib.GetStackInfo(itemB)

					if stackB
						and stackB.limit == stackA.limit
						and stackB.count < stackB.limit
						and isSafeStackPair(itemA, itemB, range.pocketIndex)
					then
						local sourceSlot = slotA
						local sourceId = itemA
						local sourceStack = stackA
						local targetSlot = slotB
						local targetId = itemB
						local targetStack = stackB

						if stackA.count > stackB.count then
							sourceSlot = slotB
							sourceId = itemB
							sourceStack = stackB
							targetSlot = slotA
							targetId = itemA
							targetStack = stackA
						end

						local freeSpace = targetStack.limit - targetStack.count
						local freesSource = sourceStack.count <= freeSpace
						local candidate = {
							sourceSlot = sourceSlot,
							sourceId = sourceId,
							sourceCount = sourceStack.count,
							targetSlot = targetSlot,
							targetId = targetId,
							targetCount = targetStack.count,
							moveCount = math.min(sourceStack.count, freeSpace),
							freesSource = freesSource,
							pocketIndex = range.pocketIndex,
						}

						if best == nil
							or candidate.targetCount > best.targetCount
							or (
								candidate.targetCount == best.targetCount
								and candidate.freesSource
								and not best.freesSource
							)
							or (
								candidate.targetCount == best.targetCount
								and candidate.freesSource == best.freesSource
								and candidate.sourceCount < best.sourceCount
							)
						then
							best = candidate
						end
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end

	return best
end

local function pendingMergeApplied()
	if pendingMerge == nil then
		return false
	end

	local sourceId = containerLib.GetItem(ITEM_CONT_INVENTORY, pendingMerge.sourceSlot)
	local targetId = containerLib.GetItem(ITEM_CONT_INVENTORY, pendingMerge.targetSlot)
	local sourceStack = sourceId and itemLib.GetStackInfo(sourceId)
	local targetStack = targetId and itemLib.GetStackInfo(targetId)
	local sourceCount = sourceStack and sourceStack.count or 0
	local targetCount = targetStack and targetStack.count or 0

	return sourceCount ~= pendingMerge.sourceCount
		or targetCount ~= pendingMerge.targetCount
end

local function startAutoUse()
	useActive = true
	if not useTimerRegistered then
		useTimerRegistered = true
		common.RegisterEventHandler(processAutoUse, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
	end
end

local function confirmMergeQuestions(reason)
	local okQuestions, questions = pcall(function()
		return questionLib.GetQuestions()
	end)
	if not okQuestions or questions == nil then
		return false
	end

	local confirmed = false
	for _, questionId in pairs(questions) do
		local okInfo, info = pcall(function()
			return questionLib.GetInfo(questionId)
		end)
		if okInfo and info ~= nil and info.type == "!QuizQuestion" then
			local data = info.questionData
			local text = data and fromWString(data.text) or ""
			local quizType = data and data.type or ""
			local acceptAny = pendingMerge ~= nil and pendingMerge.pocketIndex == 0
			local acceptByText = string.find(text, "срок", 1, true) ~= nil
				or string.find(text, "Срок", 1, true) ~= nil
				or string.find(text, "врем", 1, true) ~= nil
				or string.find(text, "Врем", 1, true) ~= nil

			if acceptAny or acceptByText then
				local okSend = pcall(function()
					questionLib.SendData(questionId, { choice = 1 })
				end)
				log(
					"merge-question-confirm"
					.. " reason=" .. tostring(reason)
					.. " pocket=" .. tostring(pendingMerge and pendingMerge.pocketIndex or "nil")
					.. " sent=" .. boolText(okSend)
					.. " type=" .. tostring(quizType)
					.. " text=" .. shortText(text)
				)
				confirmed = true
			end
		end
	end

	return confirmed
end

local function isBagVisible()
	return bagWidget ~= nil and bagWidget:IsVisibleEx()
end

local function scheduleInventoryRescan(reason)
	if not isBagVisible() then
		return
	end

	if mergeActive or useActive or pendingMerge ~= nil or pendingAutoUse ~= nil then
		return
	end

	inventoryRescanPending = true
	inventoryRescanTicks = 1
	if not inventoryRescanTimerRegistered then
		inventoryRescanTimerRegistered = true
		common.RegisterEventHandler(processInventoryRescan, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
	end
	log("inventory-rescan-scheduled reason=" .. tostring(reason))
end

processInventoryRescan = function()
	if not inventoryRescanPending then
		inventoryRescanTimerRegistered = false
		common.UnRegisterEventHandler(processInventoryRescan, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
		return
	end

	if not isBagVisible() then
		inventoryRescanPending = false
		inventoryRescanTimerRegistered = false
		common.UnRegisterEventHandler(processInventoryRescan, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
		return
	end

	if mergeActive or useActive or pendingMerge ~= nil or pendingAutoUse ~= nil then
		return
	end

	inventoryRescanTicks = inventoryRescanTicks - 1
	if inventoryRescanTicks > 0 then
		return
	end

	inventoryRescanPending = false
	inventoryRescanTimerRegistered = false
	common.UnRegisterEventHandler(processInventoryRescan, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
	log("inventory-rescan-start")
	scanBag()
end

local function processMerges()
	if not mergeActive then
		mergeTimerRegistered = false
		common.UnRegisterEventHandler(processMerges, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
		return
	end

	if pendingMerge ~= nil then
		confirmMergeQuestions("timer")
		if pendingMergeApplied() then
			log("merge-applied")
			pendingMerge = nil
		else
			pendingMerge.waitTicks = pendingMerge.waitTicks - 1
			if pendingMerge.waitTicks <= 0 then
				log("merge-waiting-for-confirmation")
				mergeActive = false
			end
			return
		end
	end

	local pair = findBestMergePair()
	if pair == nil then
		log("merge-complete")
		mergeActive = false
		updateManualUseButton()
		if postUseMerge then
			postUseMerge = false
			log("post-use-merge-complete")
		else
			startAutoUse()
		end
		return
	end

	pendingMerge = {
		sourceSlot = pair.sourceSlot,
		sourceCount = pair.sourceCount,
		targetSlot = pair.targetSlot,
		targetCount = pair.targetCount,
		pocketIndex = pair.pocketIndex,
		waitTicks = 10,
	}

	containerLib.MoveSlotItem(
		ITEM_CONT_INVENTORY,
		pair.sourceSlot,
		ITEM_CONT_INVENTORY,
		pair.targetSlot,
		pair.moveCount
	)
	log(
		"merge-request"
		.. " sourceSlot=" .. tostring(pair.sourceSlot)
		.. " sourceCount=" .. tostring(pair.sourceCount)
		.. " targetSlot=" .. tostring(pair.targetSlot)
		.. " targetCount=" .. tostring(pair.targetCount)
		.. " moveCount=" .. tostring(pair.moveCount)
	)
end

processAutoUse = function()
	if not useActive then
		useTimerRegistered = false
		common.UnRegisterEventHandler(processAutoUse, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
		return
	end

	if pendingAutoUse ~= nil then
		local currentCount = getResourceOverallCount(pendingAutoUse.resourceId)
		if currentCount < pendingAutoUse.overallCount then
			autoUseChangedBag = true
			log(
				"auto-use-applied"
				.. " rule=" .. pendingAutoUse.rule.name
				.. " remaining=" .. tostring(currentCount)
			)
			if (pendingAutoUse.rule.repeatUntilGone and currentCount > 0)
				or (pendingAutoUse.rule.repeatWhileEligible
					and currentCount >= (pendingAutoUse.rule.minOverallCount or 1)) then
				attemptedUseRules[pendingAutoUse.resourceId] = nil
			end
		else
			log(
				"auto-use-not-applied"
				.. " rule=" .. pendingAutoUse.rule.name
				.. " remaining=" .. tostring(currentCount)
			)
			if pendingAutoUse.rule.repeatUntilGone or pendingAutoUse.rule.repeatWhileEligible then
				local failures = (repeatNoProgress[pendingAutoUse.resourceId] or 0) + 1
				repeatNoProgress[pendingAutoUse.resourceId] = failures
				if failures < 5 then
					attemptedUseRules[pendingAutoUse.resourceId] = nil
				end
			end
		end
		if currentCount < pendingAutoUse.overallCount then
			repeatNoProgress[pendingAutoUse.resourceId] = 0
		end
		pendingAutoUse = nil
	end

	local items = containerLib.GetItems(ITEM_CONT_INVENTORY)
	for slot = 0, containerLib.GetSize(ITEM_CONT_INVENTORY) - 1 do
		local itemId = items[slot]
		if itemId ~= nil then
			local resourceId = safePersistentId(itemId)
			local rule = AUTO_USE_RULES[resourceId]
			if rule ~= nil and not rule.manualOnly and not attemptedUseRules[resourceId] then
				local overallCount = itemLib.GetOverallStackCount(itemId)
				if overallCount >= rule.minOverallCount then
					local stack = itemLib.GetStackInfo(itemId)
					local stackCount = stack and stack.count or 1
					local useCount = rule.useCount or stackCount
					useCount = math.min(useCount, stackCount)
					attemptedUseRules[resourceId] = true

					if itemLib.IsUseItemAndTakeActions(itemId)
						and itemLib.CanActivateForUseItem(itemId)
					then
						local usage = getUseAction(itemId)
						if usage == nil then
							log(
								"auto-use-no-action"
								.. " rule=" .. rule.name
								.. " slot=" .. tostring(slot)
							)
						else
							local actionCount = rule.useWholeStack and stackCount or 1
							if rule.useOverallCount then
								actionCount = overallCount
								if usage.maxStack ~= nil and usage.maxStack > 0 then
									actionCount = math.min(actionCount, usage.maxStack)
								end
							end
							if rule.useAllBatches then
								local consumedPerAction = usage.consumeItems or rule.useCount or 1
								local eligibleCount = overallCount - rule.minOverallCount + 1
								actionCount = math.max(1, math.floor(
									(eligibleCount + consumedPerAction - 1) / consumedPerAction
								))
							end
							avatar.UseItemAndTakeActions(itemId, actionCount, usage.sysIndex)
							pendingAutoUse = {
								resourceId = resourceId,
								overallCount = overallCount,
								rule = rule,
							}
							log(
								"auto-use"
								.. " rule=" .. rule.name
								.. " slot=" .. tostring(slot)
								.. " count=" .. tostring(actionCount)
								.. " overall=" .. tostring(overallCount)
								.. " action=" .. tostring(usage.sysIndex)
								.. " consumes=" .. tostring(usage.consumeItems)
								.. " maxStack=" .. tostring(usage.maxStack)
							)
							return
						end
					end

					log(
						"auto-use-unsupported"
						.. " rule=" .. rule.name
						.. " slot=" .. tostring(slot)
						.. " overall=" .. tostring(overallCount)
					)
				end
			end
		end
	end

	log("auto-use-complete")
	useActive = false
	if autoUseChangedBag then
		postUseMerge = true
		autoUseChangedBag = false
		mergeActive = true
		pendingMerge = nil
		if not mergeTimerRegistered then
			mergeTimerRegistered = true
			common.RegisterEventHandler(processMerges, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
		end
		log("post-use-merge-start")
	else
		updateManualUseButton()
	end
end

local function isMergeConfirmationQuestion(info)
	if info == nil or info.type ~= "!QuizQuestion" then
		return false
	end

	return true
end

local function onQuestionAdded(event)
	if pendingMerge == nil or event.id == nil then
		return
	end

	local info = questionLib.GetInfo(event.id)
	if isMergeConfirmationQuestion(info) then
		if confirmMergeQuestions("event") then
			pendingMerge.waitTicks = 10
		end
	end
end

scanBag = function()
	scanNumber = scanNumber + 1
	local items = containerLib.GetItems(ITEM_CONT_INVENTORY)
	local pocketsCount = avatar.InventoryGetPocketsCount()

	log(
		"scan-start"
		.. " number=" .. tostring(scanNumber)
		.. " totalSlots=" .. tostring(containerLib.GetSize(ITEM_CONT_INVENTORY))
		.. " pockets=" .. tostring(pocketsCount)
	)

	scanPocket(-1, items)
	for pocketIndex = 0, pocketsCount - 1 do
		scanPocket(pocketIndex, items)
	end

	log("scan-end number=" .. tostring(scanNumber))

	mergeActive = true
	pendingMerge = nil
	pendingAutoUse = nil
	repeatNoProgress = {}
	attemptedUseRules = {}
	postUseMerge = false
	autoUseChangedBag = false
	if manualUseButton ~= nil then
		manualUseButton:Show(false)
	end
	if not mergeTimerRegistered then
		mergeTimerRegistered = true
		common.RegisterEventHandler(processMerges, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
	end
end

local function onWidgetShowChanged(event)
	if bagWidget == nil or event.widget == nil then
		return
	end

	if event.widget:GetInstanceId() ~= bagWidgetInstanceId then
		return
	end

	if bagWidget:IsVisibleEx() then
		scanBag()
	end
end

local function onContainerChanged(event)
	scheduleInventoryRescan("container-changed")
end

local function findBagWidget()
	local contextBag = stateMainForm:GetChildChecked("ContextBag", false)
	if contextBag == nil then
		return false
	end

	bagWidget = contextBag:GetChildChecked("Bag", false)
	if bagWidget == nil then
		return false
	end

	bagWidgetInstanceId = bagWidget:GetInstanceId()
	bagWidget:SetOnShowNotification(true)
	if manualUseButton ~= nil then
		bagWidget:AddChild(manualUseButton)
		manualUseButton:SetVal("button_label", userMods.ToWString("CHEST"))
		manualUseButton:Show(false)
	end
	return true
end

local function waitForBagWidget()
	if not waitingForBagWidget then
		return
	end

	if findBagWidget() then
		waitingForBagWidget = false
		common.UnRegisterEventHandler(waitForBagWidget, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
		log("observer-ready")
		if bagWidget:IsVisibleEx() then
			scanBag()
		end
	end
end

local function initialize()
	common.RegisterEventHandler(onWidgetShowChanged, "EVENT_WIDGET_SHOW_CHANGED")
	common.RegisterEventHandler(onQuestionAdded, "EVENT_QUESTION_ADDED")
	common.RegisterEventHandler(onContainerChanged, "EVENT_CONTAINER_CHANGED")
	common.RegisterReactionHandler(onManualUseButton, "bag_manual_use")

	if findBagWidget() then
		log("observer-ready")
		if bagWidget:IsVisibleEx() then
			scanBag()
		end
	else
		waitingForBagWidget = true
		common.RegisterEventHandler(waitForBagWidget, "EVENT_SECOND_TIMER")
		log("waiting-for-bag-widget")
	end
end

if avatar.IsExist() then
	initialize()
else
	common.RegisterEventHandler(initialize, "EVENT_AVATAR_CREATED")
end

-- v17 clean-safe: three-column native bank with the proven button-based Deposit drag handle.
-- DepositeBoxContainer uses priority 120, above native Sorting priority 50.
local ADDON_NAME = "ChatGPT_BankColumnsNativePlates_v17"

local started = false
local lastSignature = nil
local legacyHideDone = false
local platesAppliedOnce = false
local cleanHeader = nil
local cleanHeaderText = nil
local headerDragHandle = nil
local lastGridWidth = 825
local lastBankOpen = false

-- Keep the old section name so positions saved by previous versions remain valid.
local BANK_POSITION_CONFIG_SECTION = "ChatGPT_BankColumnsNativePlates_v3_Position"
local bankPositionConfig = nil
local bankPositionAppliedThisOpen = false
local bankDragId = nil
local activeBankDrag = nil
local containerPriorityLoggedThisOpen = false

local GRID_COLUMNS = 3
local PLATE_GAP_X = 0
local PLATE_GAP_Y = 0

local CONTAINER_INNER_GAP = 23
local CONTAINER_POSX = 0
local CONTAINER_POSY = 0
local BANKROOT_RIGHT_MARGIN = 23
local MAINPANEL_BOTTOM_GAP = 10

local HEADER_TEXT_POSY = -44
local CLEAN_HEADER_RAISE_Y = 44
local HEADER_OVERLAY_W = 260
local HEADER_OVERLAY_H = 44
local DEPOSIT_CONTAINER_PRIORITY = 120


local function log(message)
	if common and common.LogInfo then
		common.LogInfo(ADDON_NAME, tostring(message))
	end
end

local function safe(_, fn)
	local ok, a = pcall(fn)
	if ok then return true, a end
	return false, nil
end

local function showWidget(widget, show)
	if widget and widget.Show then
		safe("Show", function() widget:Show(show and true or false) end)
	end
end

local function getChild(widget, name)
	if not widget then return nil end
	if widget.GetChildUnchecked then
		local ok, child = safe("GetChildUnchecked " .. tostring(name), function()
			return widget:GetChildUnchecked(name, false)
		end)
		if ok and child and child ~= true and child ~= false then return child end
	end
	if widget.GetChildChecked then
		local ok, child = safe("GetChildChecked " .. tostring(name), function()
			return widget:GetChildChecked(name, false)
		end)
		if ok and child and child ~= true and child ~= false then return child end
	end
	return nil
end

local function getRoot()
	local root = nil
	safe("stateMainForm", function() root = stateMainForm end)
	return root
end

local function getByPath(rootName, path)
	local widget = getChild(getRoot(), rootName)
	if not widget then return nil end
	if type(path) == "table" then
		for _, name in ipairs(path) do
			widget = getChild(widget, name)
			if not widget then return nil end
		end
	end
	return widget
end

local function getPlacement(widget)
	if not (widget and widget.GetPlacementPlain) then return nil end
	local ok, place = safe("GetPlacementPlain", function() return widget:GetPlacementPlain() end)
	if ok and type(place) == "table" then return place end
	return nil
end

local function setPlacement(widget, place)
	if widget and place and widget.SetPlacementPlain then
		safe("SetPlacementPlain", function() widget:SetPlacementPlain(place) end)
	end
end

local function copyPlacement(place)
	if type(place) ~= "table" then return nil end
	local p = {}
	for k, v in pairs(place) do p[k] = v end
	return p
end

local function loadBankPositionConfig()
	if bankPositionConfig ~= nil then return bankPositionConfig end
	bankPositionConfig = {}
	if userMods and userMods.GetGlobalConfigSection then
		local ok, loaded = safe("GetGlobalConfigSection bank", function()
			return userMods.GetGlobalConfigSection(BANK_POSITION_CONFIG_SECTION)
		end)
		if ok and type(loaded) == "table" then bankPositionConfig = loaded end
	end
	return bankPositionConfig
end

local function saveBankPositionConfig(place)
	if type(place) ~= "table" then return end
	local cfg = loadBankPositionConfig()
	cfg.bank = copyPlacement(place)
	if userMods and userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection then
		safe("SetGlobalConfigSection bank", function()
			userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection(BANK_POSITION_CONFIG_SECTION, cfg)
		end)
	elseif userMods and userMods.SetAvatarConfigSection then
		safe("SetAvatarConfigSection bank", function()
			userMods.SetAvatarConfigSection(BANK_POSITION_CONFIG_SECTION, cfg)
		end)
	end
end

local function lowMoveKeepSize(widget, x, y)
	local p = copyPlacement(getPlacement(widget)) or {}
	p.alignX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignX
	p.alignY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignY
	p.posX = math.floor(x or 0)
	p.posY = math.floor(y or 0)
	p.highPosX = 0
	p.highPosY = 0
	return p
end

local function resizeWidgetW(widget, width)
	if not widget or not width then return end
	local p = getPlacement(widget)
	if not p then return end
	p.sizeX = math.floor(width)
	setPlacement(widget, p)
end

local function resizeWidgetH(widget, height)
	if not widget or not height then return end
	local p = getPlacement(widget)
	if not p then return end
	p.sizeY = math.floor(height)
	setPlacement(widget, p)
end

local function moveWidgetXY(widget, x, y)
	if not widget then return end
	local p = getPlacement(widget)
	if not p then return end
	p.alignX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignX
	p.alignY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignY
	p.posX = math.floor(x or 0)
	p.posY = math.floor(y or 0)
	p.highPosX = 0
	p.highPosY = 0
	setPlacement(widget, p)
end

local function getVirtualScreenSize()
	local ok, params = safe("GetPosConverterParams screen", function()
		if common and common.GetPosConverterParams then
			return common.GetPosConverterParams()
		end
		return nil
	end)
	if ok and type(params) == "table" then
		local w = params.fullVirtualSizeX or params.realSizeX
		local h = params.fullVirtualSizeY or params.realSizeY
		if type(w) == "number" and type(h) == "number" and w > 0 and h > 0 then
			return math.floor(w), math.floor(h)
		end
	end
	return nil, nil
end

local function clampBankXY(x, y, rootW, rootH)
	local screenW, screenH = getVirtualScreenSize()
	local minX = 0
	local minY = CLEAN_HEADER_RAISE_Y
	if not screenW or not screenH then
		return math.max(minX, math.floor(x or 50)), math.max(minY, math.floor(y or minY)), false
	end
	local maxX = math.max(minX, screenW - math.floor(rootW or 0))
	local maxY = math.max(minY, screenH - math.floor(rootH or 0))
	local nx = math.max(minX, math.min(maxX, math.floor(x or minX)))
	local ny = math.max(minY, math.min(maxY, math.floor(y or minY)))
	return nx, ny, nx ~= math.floor(x or nx) or ny ~= math.floor(y or ny)
end

local function applySavedBankPosition(bankRoot, rootW, rootH)
	if not bankRoot or activeBankDrag or bankPositionAppliedThisOpen then return end
	local cfg = loadBankPositionConfig()
	local saved = type(cfg) == "table" and cfg.bank or nil
	local p = getPlacement(bankRoot)
	if not p then return end

	local screenW, screenH = getVirtualScreenSize()
	local hadSaved = type(saved) == "table"
	local x, y
	if hadSaved then
		x = saved.posX or 0
		y = saved.posY or CLEAN_HEADER_RAISE_Y
	elseif screenW and screenH then
		x = math.floor((screenW - math.floor(rootW or 0)) / 2)
		y = math.floor((screenH - math.floor(rootH or 0)) / 2)
	else
		x = 50
		y = CLEAN_HEADER_RAISE_Y
	end

	local clampedX, clampedY, wasClamped = clampBankXY(x, y, rootW, rootH)
	p.alignX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignX
	p.alignY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignY
	p.posX = clampedX
	p.posY = clampedY
	p.highPosX = 0
	p.highPosY = 0
	if rootW then p.sizeX = math.floor(rootW) end
	if rootH then p.sizeY = math.floor(rootH) end
	setPlacement(bankRoot, p)
	saveBankPositionConfig(p)
	bankPositionAppliedThisOpen = true
	if not hadSaved then
		log("RESET_BANK_POSITION_CENTER x=" .. tostring(p.posX) .. " y=" .. tostring(p.posY))
	elseif wasClamped then
		log("CLAMPED_BANK_POSITION x=" .. tostring(p.posX) .. " y=" .. tostring(p.posY))
	else
		log("APPLIED_BANK_POSITION x=" .. tostring(p.posX) .. " y=" .. tostring(p.posY))
	end
end

local function noteBankOpenState(open)
	if open ~= lastBankOpen then
		bankPositionAppliedThisOpen = false
		containerPriorityLoggedThisOpen = false
	end
	lastBankOpen = open and true or false
end

local headerTextCopied = false

local function findDirectChild(widget, wantedName)
	if not (widget and wantedName) then return nil end
	local ok, children = safe("GetNamedChildren optional", function()
		if widget.GetNamedChildren then return widget:GetNamedChildren() end
		return nil
	end)
	if not (ok and type(children) == "table") then return nil end
	for _, child in pairs(children) do
		local cok, name = safe("GetName optional", function()
			if child and child.GetName then return child:GetName() end
			return nil
		end)
		if cok and name == wantedName then return child end
	end
	return nil
end

local sortingSuppressionLogged = {}

local function suppressSortingWidget(widget, name)
	if not widget then return end
	showWidget(widget, false)
	if widget.SetVisible then safe("Sorting SetVisible", function() widget:SetVisible(false) end) end
	if widget.SetFade then safe("Sorting SetFade", function() widget:SetFade(0.0) end) end
	if widget.SetEnabled then safe("Sorting SetEnabled", function() widget:SetEnabled(false) end) end
	if widget.SetTransparentInput then
		safe("Sorting TransparentInput", function() widget:SetTransparentInput(true) end)
	end
	if name and not sortingSuppressionLogged[name] then
		sortingSuppressionLogged[name] = true
		log("SORTING_HIDDEN name=" .. tostring(name))
	end
end

local function widgetPriority(widget)
	if not (widget and widget.GetPriority) then return nil end
	local ok, value = safe("GetPriority", function() return widget:GetPriority() end)
	if ok and type(value) == "number" then return value end
	return nil
end

local function raiseDepositContainerAboveSorting(mainPanel, container)
	if not (mainPanel and container) then return false end
	local sorting = findDirectChild(mainPanel, "Sorting") or getChild(mainPanel, "Sorting")
	local before = widgetPriority(container)
	if container.SetPriority then
		safe("DepositeBoxContainer SetPriority", function()
			container:SetPriority(DEPOSIT_CONTAINER_PRIORITY)
		end)
	end
	local after = widgetPriority(container)
	local sortPriority = widgetPriority(sorting)
	local ok = after == DEPOSIT_CONTAINER_PRIORITY
	if not containerPriorityLoggedThisOpen then
		containerPriorityLoggedThisOpen = true
		if ok then
			log("CONTAINER_PRIORITY_RAISED old=" .. tostring(before) ..
				" new=" .. tostring(after) .. " sorting=" .. tostring(sortPriority))
		else
			log("CONTAINER_PRIORITY_FAILED old=" .. tostring(before) ..
				" after=" .. tostring(after) .. " sorting=" .. tostring(sortPriority))
		end
	end
	return ok
end

local function centerDepositHeader(mainPanel, gridW)
	if not mainPanel then return end
	lastGridWidth = gridW or lastGridWidth

	-- Keep the native title widget alive as the source of the localized title.
	-- It is visually replaced by the clean draggable addon header.
	local header = getChild(mainPanel, "HeaderText")
	if header then
		local p = getPlacement(header)
		if p then
			p.alignX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignX
			p.alignY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignY
			p.sizeX = 260
			p.posX = math.floor((lastGridWidth - p.sizeX) / 2)
			p.posY = HEADER_TEXT_POSY
			p.highPosX = 0
			p.highPosY = 0
			setPlacement(header, p)
		end
		showWidget(header, true)
		if header.SetFade then
			safe("Header fade", function() header:SetFade(0.0) end)
		end
	end

	-- Hide the named native Sorting widget as a secondary safeguard.
	suppressSortingWidget(findDirectChild(mainPanel, "Sorting") or getChild(mainPanel, "Sorting"), "Sorting")
	showWidget(findDirectChild(mainPanel, "GoldenCorner") or getChild(mainPanel, "GoldenCorner"), true)
end

local function copyNativeHeaderText()
	if headerTextCopied or not cleanHeaderText then return end
	local nativeHeader = getByPath("ContextDepositeBox", { "MainPanel", "HeaderText" })
	if not (nativeHeader and nativeHeader.GetValuedText and cleanHeaderText.SetValuedText) then return end
	local ok, title = safe("Native header valued text", function()
		return nativeHeader:GetValuedText()
	end)
	if ok and title then
		local copied = safe("Copy header valued text", function()
			cleanHeaderText:SetValuedText(title)
		end)
		if copied then headerTextCopied = true end
	end
end

local function widgetRealRect(widget)
	if not widget then return nil end
	if widget.GetRealRect then
		local ok, rect = safe("GetRealRect", function() return widget:GetRealRect() end)
		if ok and type(rect) == "table" then return rect end
	end
	return nil
end

local function rectSize(rect)
	if type(rect) ~= "table" then return nil, nil end
	local x1 = rect.x1 or rect.left or rect.l or rect[1]
	local y1 = rect.y1 or rect.top or rect.t or rect[2]
	local x2 = rect.x2 or rect.right or rect.r or rect[3]
	local y2 = rect.y2 or rect.bottom or rect.b or rect[4]
	if not (x1 and y1 and x2 and y2) then return nil, nil end
	return x2 - x1, y2 - y1
end

local function rectXY(rect)
	if type(rect) ~= "table" then return nil, nil end
	return rect.x1 or rect.left or rect.l or rect[1], rect.y1 or rect.top or rect.t or rect[2]
end

local function placementScale(widget)
	local p = getPlacement(widget)
	local r = widgetRealRect(widget)
	if not p or not r then return 1, 1, p, r end
	local rw, rh = rectSize(r)
	local sx = (rw and (p.sizeX or 0) ~= 0) and (rw / p.sizeX) or 1
	local sy = (rh and (p.sizeY or 0) ~= 0) and (rh / p.sizeY) or sx
	if not sx or sx <= 0 then sx = 1 end
	if not sy or sy <= 0 then sy = sx end
	return sx, sy, p, r
end

local function getPosConverterScale()
	local ok, params = safe("GetPosConverterParams bank drag", function()
		if common and common.GetPosConverterParams then
			return common.GetPosConverterParams()
		end
		return nil
	end)
	if ok and type(params) == "table" and
		params.realSizeX and params.realSizeY and
		params.realSizeX ~= 0 and params.realSizeY ~= 0 then
		return (params.fullVirtualSizeX or params.realSizeX) / params.realSizeX,
			(params.fullVirtualSizeY or params.realSizeY) / params.realSizeY
	end
	return 1, 1
end

local function lowPlacementFromBankRealRect(bankRoot)
	local p = copyPlacement(getPlacement(bankRoot))
	local r = widgetRealRect(bankRoot)
	if not p or not r then return p end
	local rx, ry = rectXY(r)
	if rx == nil or ry == nil then return p end
	local sx, sy = getPosConverterScale()
	p.alignX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignX
	p.alignY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignY
	p.posX = math.floor(rx * sx)
	p.posY = math.floor(ry * sy)
	p.highPosX = 0
	p.highPosY = 0
	return p
end

local function movedBankPlacement(startPlace, dx, dy)
	local p = copyPlacement(startPlace)
	if not p then return nil end
	local sx, sy = getPosConverterScale()
	p.alignX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignX
	p.alignY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or p.alignY
	p.posX = math.floor((startPlace.posX or 0) + (dx or 0) * sx)
	p.posY = math.floor((startPlace.posY or 0) + (dy or 0) * sy)
	p.highPosX = 0
	p.highPosY = 0
	return p
end

local function onBankHeaderReaction()
	-- A registered reaction keeps the button-based drag handle pickable.
end

local function onBankDndPick(params)
	if not bankDragId or not params or params.srcId ~= bankDragId then return end
	log("HEADER_DND_PICK srcId=" .. tostring(params.srcId) ..
		" x=" .. tostring(params.posX) .. " y=" .. tostring(params.posY))
	local bankRoot = getByPath("ContextDepositeBox", {})
	if not bankRoot then return end
	local startPlace = lowPlacementFromBankRealRect(bankRoot)
	if not startPlace then return end
	setPlacement(bankRoot, startPlace)
	local headerStartPlace = cleanHeader and copyPlacement(getPlacement(cleanHeader)) or nil
	activeBankDrag = {
		startX = params.posX or 0,
		startY = params.posY or 0,
		startPlace = copyPlacement(startPlace),
		lastPlace = copyPlacement(startPlace),
		headerStartPlace = headerStartPlace,
		lastHeaderPlace = copyPlacement(headerStartPlace),
		primed = false,
		dragToLogged = false
	}
	if params.srcWidget and params.srcWidget.DNDConfirmPickAttempt then
		safe("DNDConfirmPickAttempt bank", function() params.srcWidget:DNDConfirmPickAttempt() end)
	end
	log("HEADER_DND_START")
	log("DRAG_START BANK_HEADER")
end

local function updateBankDrag(params)
	if not activeBankDrag or not params or params.posX == nil or params.posY == nil then return end
	if not activeBankDrag.primed then
		activeBankDrag.startX = params.posX
		activeBankDrag.startY = params.posY
		activeBankDrag.primed = true
		activeBankDrag.lastPlace = copyPlacement(activeBankDrag.startPlace)
		return
	end
	local dx = params.posX - activeBankDrag.startX
	local dy = params.posY - activeBankDrag.startY
	if not activeBankDrag.dragToLogged then
		activeBankDrag.dragToLogged = true
		log("HEADER_DND_DRAG_TO dx=" .. tostring(dx) .. " dy=" .. tostring(dy))
	end
	if math.abs(dx) > 4000 or math.abs(dy) > 4000 then
		log("IGNORED_BAD_DND_DELTA BANK dx=" .. tostring(dx) .. " dy=" .. tostring(dy))
		return
	end
	local bankRoot = getByPath("ContextDepositeBox", {})
	local p = movedBankPlacement(activeBankDrag.startPlace, dx, dy)
	local hp = movedBankPlacement(activeBankDrag.headerStartPlace, dx, dy)
	if bankRoot and p then
		setPlacement(bankRoot, p)
		activeBankDrag.lastPlace = copyPlacement(p)
	end
	if cleanHeader and hp then
		setPlacement(cleanHeader, hp)
		activeBankDrag.lastHeaderPlace = copyPlacement(hp)
	end
end

local function onBankDndDragTo(params)
	if activeBankDrag and params and params.srcId == bankDragId then updateBankDrag(params) end
end

local function finishBankDrag(params, cancelled)
	if not activeBankDrag then return end
	local bankRoot = getByPath("ContextDepositeBox", {})
	if cancelled then
		if bankRoot then setPlacement(bankRoot, activeBankDrag.startPlace) end
		if cleanHeader and activeBankDrag.headerStartPlace then setPlacement(cleanHeader, activeBankDrag.headerStartPlace) end
		log("HEADER_DND_CANCEL")
		log("DRAG_CANCEL BANK_HEADER")
	else
		updateBankDrag(params or {})
		local p = activeBankDrag.lastPlace or (bankRoot and getPlacement(bankRoot))
		local hp = activeBankDrag.lastHeaderPlace or activeBankDrag.headerStartPlace
		if bankRoot and p then setPlacement(bankRoot, p) end
		if cleanHeader and hp then setPlacement(cleanHeader, hp) end
		if p then
			saveBankPositionConfig(p)
			bankPositionAppliedThisOpen = true
			log("SAVED_BANK_POSITION x=" .. tostring(p.posX) .. " y=" .. tostring(p.posY))
		end
		if params and params.srcWidget and params.srcWidget.DNDConfirmDropAttempt then
			safe("DNDConfirmDropAttempt bank", function() params.srcWidget:DNDConfirmDropAttempt() end)
		end
		log("HEADER_DND_DROP")
		log("DRAG_FINISH BANK_HEADER")
	end
	activeBankDrag = nil
end

local function onBankDndDrop(params)
	if activeBankDrag and params and params.srcId == bankDragId then finishBankDrag(params, false) end
end

local function onBankDndCancel(params)
	if activeBankDrag and (not params or params.srcId == bankDragId) then finishBankDrag(params, true) end
end

local function registerBankHeaderDrag()
	if bankDragId or not headerDragHandle then return end
	if headerDragHandle.SetTransparentInput then
		safe("HeaderDragHandle input", function() headerDragHandle:SetTransparentInput(false) end)
	end
	if headerDragHandle.SetEnabled then
		safe("HeaderDragHandle enabled", function() headerDragHandle:SetEnabled(true) end)
	end
	local ok, id = safe("DNDRegisterGeneric bank header", function()
		if headerDragHandle.DNDRegisterGeneric then return headerDragHandle:DNDRegisterGeneric(false) end
		return nil
	end)
	if ok and id then
		bankDragId = id
		log("REGISTERED BANK_HEADER dragId=" .. tostring(id))
	else
		log("REGISTER_BANK_HEADER_FAILED")
	end
end

local function updateCleanHeader()
	if not cleanHeader then return end
	local bankRoot = getByPath("ContextDepositeBox", {})
	local mainPanel = getByPath("ContextDepositeBox", { "MainPanel" })
	local okVisible, visible = false, false
	if mainPanel then
		okVisible, visible = safe("MainPanel IsVisible", function()
			return mainPanel:IsVisible()
		end)
	end
	if not bankRoot or not okVisible or visible ~= true then
		showWidget(cleanHeader, false)
		return
	end

	copyNativeHeaderText()

	local sx, sy, bp, br = placementScale(bankRoot)
	local hp = getPlacement(cleanHeader)
	if not bp or not br or not hp then return end
	local rx, ry = rectXY(br)
	if not rx or not ry then return end
	local rootLeftUnits = rx / sx
	local rootTopUnits  = ry / sy
	local headerW = hp.sizeX or HEADER_OVERLAY_W
	local targetX = math.floor(rootLeftUnits + (lastGridWidth - headerW) / 2)
	local targetY = math.floor(rootTopUnits - CLEAN_HEADER_RAISE_Y)
	if hp.posX ~= targetX or hp.posY ~= targetY or hp.sizeX ~= HEADER_OVERLAY_W or hp.sizeY ~= HEADER_OVERLAY_H then
		hp.alignX = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or hp.alignX
		hp.alignY = WIDGET_ALIGN_LOW or hp.alignY
		hp.posX = targetX
		hp.posY = targetY
		hp.sizeX = HEADER_OVERLAY_W
		hp.sizeY = HEADER_OVERLAY_H
		hp.highPosX = 0
		hp.highPosY = 0
		setPlacement(cleanHeader, hp)
	end
	showWidget(cleanHeader, true)
end

local function onFrame()
	-- Keep only the proven lightweight v7 header sync in the frame handler.
	updateCleanHeader()
end

local function isDepositOpen()
	if ITEM_CONT_DEPOSITE == nil or not containerLib or type(containerLib.IsOpen) ~= "function" then
		return false
	end
	local ok, open = safe("IsOpen", function() return containerLib.IsOpen(ITEM_CONT_DEPOSITE) end)
	return ok and open == true
end

local function getDepositSize()
	local open = isDepositOpen()
	noteBankOpenState(open)
	if not open then return 0 end
	if not containerLib or type(containerLib.GetSize) ~= "function" then return 0 end
	local ok, size = safe("GetSize", function() return containerLib.GetSize(ITEM_CONT_DEPOSITE) end)
	if ok and type(size) == "number" and size > 0 then return size end
	return 0
end

local function getVisualInner()
	return getByPath("ContextDepositeBox", {
		"MainPanel", "DepositeBoxContainer", "__Border", "__Content", "DepositeBoxContentInner"
	})
end

local function plateIndexFromName(name)
	if type(name) ~= "string" then return nil end
	local digits = string.match(name, "^SlotsPlate(%d+)$")
	return digits and tonumber(digits) or nil
end

local function collectNativePlates(inner)
	local plates = {}
	local ok, result = safe("GetNamedChildren", function()
		if inner and inner.GetNamedChildren then
			return inner:GetNamedChildren()
		end
		return nil
	end)
	local children = (ok and type(result) == "table") and result or {}
	for _, child in pairs(children) do
		local cok, name = safe("GetName", function()
			if child and child.GetName then return child:GetName() end
			return nil
		end)
		local index = plateIndexFromName(cok and name or nil)
		if index then table.insert(plates, { index = index, widget = child }) end
	end
	table.sort(plates, function(l, r) return l.index < r.index end)
	return plates
end

local function hideLegacySlotPlate(reason)
	-- Hide the obsolete direct SlotsPlate; the active plates live inside DepositeBoxContentInner.
	local bankRoot = getByPath("ContextDepositeBox", {})
	local legacy = findDirectChild(bankRoot, "SlotsPlate")
	showWidget(legacy, false)
	if not legacyHideDone then
		legacyHideDone = true
		log("LEGACY_HIDE reason=" .. tostring(reason))
	end
end

local function arrangeNativeVisualPlates(reason)
	local size = getDepositSize()
	if size <= 0 then
		lastSignature = nil
		return false
	end

	local bankRoot  = getByPath("ContextDepositeBox", {})
	local mainPanel = getByPath("ContextDepositeBox", { "MainPanel" })
	local container = getByPath("ContextDepositeBox", { "MainPanel", "DepositeBoxContainer" })
	local inner     = getVisualInner()

	if not inner then
		log("NO_INNER reason=" .. tostring(reason))
		return false
	end

	hideLegacySlotPlate(reason)

	local neededPlates = math.ceil(size / 12)
	local plates = collectNativePlates(inner)
	local foundPlates = #plates

	if foundPlates <= 0 then
		if not platesAppliedOnce then
			log("WAIT_PLATES reason=" .. tostring(reason) .. " needed=" .. tostring(neededPlates))
		end
		return false
	end

	-- Read native plate size from first plate
	local plateW, plateH = 275, 128
	local p0 = getPlacement(plates[1].widget)
	if p0 then
		if (p0.sizeX or 0) >= 20 then plateW = math.floor(p0.sizeX) end
		if (p0.sizeY or 0) >= 20 then plateH = math.floor(p0.sizeY) end
	end

	local stepX = plateW + PLATE_GAP_X

	-- Position each plate in the grid
	local foundSlots = 0
	for visualIndex, plateInfo in ipairs(plates) do
		local col = (visualIndex - 1) % GRID_COLUMNS
		local row = math.floor((visualIndex - 1) / GRID_COLUMNS)
		local x = col * stepX
		local y = row * (plateH + PLATE_GAP_Y)
		setPlacement(plateInfo.widget, lowMoveKeepSize(plateInfo.widget, x, y))
		showWidget(plateInfo.widget, true)
		foundSlots = foundSlots + math.min(12, math.max(0, size - (visualIndex - 1) * 12))
	end

	-- Grid dimensions
	local usedCols = math.min(GRID_COLUMNS, foundPlates)
	local usedRows = math.ceil(foundPlates / GRID_COLUMNS)
	local gridW = usedCols * plateW + (usedCols - 1) * PLATE_GAP_X
	local gridH = usedRows * plateH + math.max(0, usedRows - 1) * PLATE_GAP_Y

	-- Resize inner
	resizeWidgetW(inner, gridW)
	resizeWidgetH(inner, gridH)

	-- Move content to the left edge so the obsolete side gap disappears.
	moveWidgetXY(container, CONTAINER_POSX, CONTAINER_POSY)

	-- Resize container (width AND height — eliminates scrollbar)
	local containerW = gridW + CONTAINER_INNER_GAP
	resizeWidgetW(container, containerW)
	resizeWidgetH(container, gridH)

	-- DepositeBoxContainer and Sorting are siblings; priority 120 paints the shelves above Sorting.
	raiseDepositContainerAboveSorting(mainPanel, container)

	-- Hide the native scrollbar explicitly
	local scrollBar = getChild(container, "__ScrollBar")
	showWidget(scrollBar, false)

	-- Resize __Content sY to match gridH (it has aY=0 and fixed sY)
	local border  = getChild(container, "__Border")
	local content = border and getChild(border, "__Content") or nil
	if content then
		resizeWidgetH(content, gridH)
	end

	-- Resize bankRoot width
	local rootW = CONTAINER_POSX + containerW + BANKROOT_RIGHT_MARGIN

	-- Crop the native top decoration while keeping the close corner inside MainPanel.
	local newMainPanelSY = CONTAINER_POSY + gridH + MAINPANEL_BOTTOM_GAP
	local newBankRootSY  = newMainPanelSY

	-- Reset MainPanel width mode and set the calculated height.
	if mainPanel then
		local mp = getPlacement(mainPanel)
		if mp then
			mp.sizeX = 0
			mp.sizeY = newMainPanelSY
			setPlacement(mainPanel, mp)
			log("RESET mainPanel.sX=0 sY=" .. tostring(newMainPanelSY))
		end
	end

	resizeWidgetW(bankRoot, rootW)
	resizeWidgetH(bankRoot, newBankRootSY)
	-- Restore a saved position, or center the bank when no saved position exists.
	applySavedBankPosition(bankRoot, rootW, newBankRootSY)

	-- Position the native title source, hide Sorting, and keep the close corner.
	centerDepositHeader(mainPanel, gridW)

	-- Hide ButtonClose (not needed)
	if mainPanel then
		local btnClose = getChild(mainPanel, "ButtonClose")
		showWidget(btnClose, false)
	end

	local sig = tostring(size) .. ":" .. tostring(foundPlates) .. ":" ..
		tostring(gridW) .. "x" .. tostring(gridH) .. ":rootW=" .. tostring(rootW) .. ":mpSY=" .. tostring(newMainPanelSY)
	if sig ~= lastSignature then
		lastSignature = sig
		log("APPLIED reason=" .. tostring(reason) ..
			" size=" .. tostring(size) ..
			" plates=" .. tostring(foundPlates) .. "/" .. tostring(neededPlates) ..
			" slots=" .. tostring(foundSlots) ..
			" plateW=" .. tostring(plateW) .. " plateH=" .. tostring(plateH) ..
			" grid=" .. tostring(usedCols) .. "x" .. tostring(usedRows) ..
			" gridW=" .. tostring(gridW) .. " gridH=" .. tostring(gridH) ..
			" containerW=" .. tostring(containerW) ..
			" rootW=" .. tostring(rootW) ..
			" mpSY=" .. tostring(newMainPanelSY) ..
			" bankRootSY=" .. tostring(newBankRootSY) ..
			" header=stable_v7_attached sorting=container_priority_120_over_native cross=visible center=disabled")
	end
	if foundSlots > 0 then platesAppliedOnce = true end
	return foundSlots > 0
end

local function refresh(reason)
	arrangeNativeVisualPlates(reason)
end

local function onDepositChanged()
	refresh("EVENT_DEPOSITE_BOX_CHANGED")
end

local function init()
	if started then return end
	started = true
	cleanHeader = mainForm and getChild(mainForm, "HeaderOverlay") or nil
	cleanHeaderText = cleanHeader and getChild(cleanHeader, "HeaderText") or nil
	headerDragHandle = cleanHeader and getChild(cleanHeader, "HeaderDragHandle") or nil
	showWidget(cleanHeader, false)
	if mainForm then
		safe("MainForm input", function() mainForm:SetTransparentInput(false) end)
	end
	if common and common.RegisterReactionHandler then
		common.RegisterReactionHandler(onBankHeaderReaction, "bank_header_probe_click")
	end
	if common and common.RegisterEventHandler then
		common.RegisterEventHandler(onDepositChanged, "EVENT_DEPOSITE_BOX_CHANGED")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(onBankDndPick, "EVENT_DND_PICK_ATTEMPT")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(onBankDndDragTo, "EVENT_DND_DRAG_TO")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(onBankDndDrop, "EVENT_DND_DROP_ATTEMPT")
		common.RegisterEventHandler(onBankDndCancel, "EVENT_DND_DRAG_CANCELLED")
	end
	if common and common.RegisterFrameHandler then
		common.RegisterFrameHandler(onFrame, false)
	end
	copyNativeHeaderText()
	registerBankHeaderDrag()
	log("READY v17 clean-safe; proven button Deposit drag, three-column bank, content priority Sort fix")
	refresh("init")
	updateCleanHeader()
end

if common and common.RegisterEventHandler then
	common.RegisterEventHandler(init, "EVENT_AVATAR_CREATED")
end
if avatar and avatar.IsExist and avatar.IsExist() then
	init()
end

-- Количество юнитов, отображаемых аддоном
ConfigAllies.UnitsCount = 30

-- Ширина списка юнитов в диапазоне [260, 800]
ConfigAllies.UnitListWidth = 300
 
-- Окрашивать ли панельки игроков в цвет класса?
ConfigAllies.ColorizePlayersByClass = false

-- Окрашивать ли панельки петов в цвет класса?

-- Вертикальный размер плашки юнита

ConfigAllies.PlatePadding = 2

ConfigAllies.NameOffset = 2

ConfigAllies.ShowMyself = true

ConfigAllies.ShowGuild = true

-- Показывать ли уровень юнита?
ConfigAllies.ShowLevel = true

-- Оставлять ли умерших юнитов в списке до их полного исчезновения?
ConfigAllies.RetainDeadUnits = false

-- Показывать только тех юнитов, которые в бою
ConfigAllies.ShowCombatantsOnly = true

ConfigAllies.NewCombatantsNotify = true

-- Сообщать только о мобах

-- Размер шрифта для имени юнита

-- Бонус к приоритету игроков (имеет смысл ставить от 100к)

ConfigAllies.ShowPets = true

-- Если вместо числа после знака равенства написать nil, то соответствующие петы не будут показываться вовсе
-- Этот коэффиециент умножается на PetPriorityBonus. Соответственно, если тут число больше 1 и не включена
-- сортировка по классам, то пет будет выше игроков в списке при условии одинаковости обоих базовых бонусов
-- (для игроков и петов).
-- Если же включена сортировка по классам, то эти числа вместе с ClassPriorities будут задавать сквозной порядок
-- отображения соответствующих юнитов

}

local originalGetAvatarConfig = GetAvatarConfig
local originalSetAvatarConfig = SetAvatarConfig

local fallbackSettings = {
	groups = {
		allies = {
			ColorizePetsByOwnerClass = false,
			ColorizePlayersByClass = false,
			GSInsteadOfLevel = true,
			HeaderOffset = 0,
			HealerDistance = 1,
			NewCombatantsNotify = true,
			NotifyMobsOnly = true,
			PlateHeight = 24,
			PlatePadding = 2,
			RetainDeadUnits = false,
			ShowAdditionalMobs = false,
			ShowAspects = true,
			ShowCombatantsOnly = true,
			ShowGuild = false,
			ShowLevel = false,
			ShowMyself = true,
			ShowPets = false,
			SortByClass = false,
			UnitListWidth = 11,
			UnitNameFontSize = 14,
			UnitsCount = 30
		},
		enemies = {
			ColorizePetsByOwnerClass = false,
			ColorizePlayersByClass = false,
			GSInsteadOfLevel = true,
			HeaderOffset = 0,
			NewCombatantsNotify = true,
			NotifyMobsOnly = true,
			PlateHeight = 24,
			PlatePadding = 2,
			RetainDeadUnits = false,
			ShowAdditionalMobs = false,
			ShowAspects = true,
			ShowCombatantsOnly = true,
			ShowGuild = false,
			ShowLevel = true,
			ShowPets = false,
			SortByClass = false,
			UnitListWidth = 11,
			UnitNameFontSize = 14,
			UnitsCount = 30
		},
		global = {
			AnimateHP = true,
			ShowCount = true,
			ShowNonSelectable = false,
			ShowTarget = true,
			TryToRestore = false,
			UpdateGSOnSelect = false
		},
		mobs = {
			HeaderOffset = 0,
			HighlightTagged = true,
			MaxReputationLevel = 4,
			NewCombatantsNotify = true,
			PlateHeight = 24,
			PlatePadding = 2,
			RetainDeadUnits = false,
			ShowCombatantsOnly = true,
			ShowLevel = false,
			UnitListWidth = 11,
			UnitNameFontSize = 14,
			UnitsCount = 16
		}
	}
}

local settings = GetGlobalConfig("Settings")
if not settings then
	settings = originalGetAvatarConfig("Settings") or fallbackSettings
	SetGlobalConfig("Settings", settings)
end

function GetAvatarConfig(name)
	if name == "Settings" then
		return GetGlobalConfig(name)
	end
	return originalGetAvatarConfig(name)
end

function SetAvatarConfig(name, value)
	if name == "Settings" then
		SetGlobalConfig(name, value)
		return
	end
	originalSetAvatarConfig(name, value)
end

По умолчанию, петы не показываются в списке, но их можно включить в текстовом конфигурационном файле.

Показывается только при доступности. Существенно снижает быстродействие.
Показывать сумму очков экипировки вместо уровня
Работает только для членов своих группы и отряда
Только юниты с таким уровнем репутации или ниже (агрессивней/менее дружелюбней) будут показаны в списке. Применимо только для режима выключенных фракционных фильтров.
Раз в 5 дней аддон будет напоминать о том, когда его надо будет обновить
Показывать только тех, кто в бою
Количество будет показываться слева от титула
Настройка актуальна только когда аватар находится вне группы и отряда. В группе или в отряде аватара показывает всегда, независимо от  настройки.
Юнит может находиться в другом плане, или в недоступной зоне. В таком случае его может быть нельзя выделить.
Глобальная опция, которая позволяет исключить всех петов, независимо от прочих настроек
Порядок классов задается в текстовом конфигурационном файле соответствующего режима
Режим заморозки работает при наведении курсора на список. Работает в тестовом режиме.
Восстанавливать плашки в режиме заморозки списка
Взятие в цель персонажа будет сильно тормозить, но при этом очки экипировки будут актуализированы при каждом выделении

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- AddonBase.lua
--[[
	:
		AddonBaseInternal.lua / AddonBaseUserMods.lua
		
	  ,      
		  
		   
		      API
		    /  /   
		 userdata
		  
	
	   ( )
		ADDON_NAME -   
		HALF_PI = math.pi / 2
		DOUBLE_PI = math.pi * 2
		TO_DEGREES = 180 / math.pi
		TO_RADIANS = math.pi / 180
		
		IsWs( any ) = apitype( any ) == "WString"
		IsVt( any ) = apitype( any ) == "ValuedText"
		IsVo( any ) = apitype( any ) == "ValuedObjectLua"
		IsValidText = common.IsValidText
		IntWs = common.FormatInt
		FloatWs = common.FormatFloat
		NumberWs = common.FormatNumber
		GetEWs = common.GetEmptyWString
		GetEVt = common.CreateValuedText
		GetEVo = common.CreateValuedObject
		CreateVt = common.CreateValuedText
		
	   ( ) -   
		DEBUG_BYPASS_ASSERTS = false -     error / assert
		LOG_MULTILINE_FORMAT = true -        "\n"   
		
		print = LogInfo
		
	   ( *     )
		table.isempty( tab ) -    
		table.size( tab ) -    
		table.map( tab ) -  ""   (-) => (-)
		table.imap( tab ) -  ""   (-) => (-),  array 
		table.maxn2( tab ) -     ,      nil
		table.minn( tab ) -     ,      nil
		*table.append( tab, [pos], otherTab ) -  table.insert,    array   othertab
		*table.normalize( tab ) -     0    1
		*table.denormalize( tab ) -     1    0
		table.index( tab, ... ) -  tab[ arg1 ][ arg2 ] ... [ argN ]
		*table.newindex( tab, ... ) -  tab[ arg1 ][ arg2 ] ... [ argN - 1 ] = argN
		table.getcount( tab, entry, [equal] ) -   entry   tab,      (  ==)
		table.search( tab, entry, [equal] ) -    entry   tab,      (  ==)
			   false
			   true,     
		table.binsearch( tab, entry, [fless], [fequal] ) -   entry  tab
			fless -    (  <)
			fequal -    (  ==)
			   false,      entry  ,     
			   true,     entry,     
		*table.traverse( tab, mutator ) -           mutator( key, value )
		table.getrandom( tab ) -    -  
		table.igetrandom( tab ) -    -  ,  array 
		string.escape( str ) -      lua-regexp
		string-split( str, [sep = %s], [noEscape = false] ) -      ()
		sortpairs( tab ) -  pairs,    
		zpairs( tab ) -  ipairs,    0
	
	 API
		ReloadAddon() -   
		ValidateText( text ) -      -  ,  :    ,    
		JoinTextValues( values, [glueFormatWString = DefaultJoinTextValuesFormat], [iter = ipairs] ) -      values   VT
		GetAddonText / GetAddonTexture / GetAddonSound / GetStateText / GetStateTexture / GetStateSound ( sysGroup, sysName, isOptionl )
			    /       sysGroup   sysName
			  isOptional      
			              API
			
	  API
		error( template, ... ) -  
			template -    (  %s)
			... -  ,    advtostring
		assert( cond, template, ... ) -    cond   
		advtostring( any, [flat = false], [brief = INT_MAX] ) -        
			flat -     
			brief -     
		LogInfo( ... ) -      INFO
		LogWarning( ... ) -      WARNING
		LogError( ... ) -      error
		LogInfoTS( ... ) - LogInfo( ... )  :  ()  
		LogInfoTN( ... ) - LogInfo( ... )  :    ( )         LogInfoTN
		LogMemoryUsage() -   
		LogTrace() -  
]]
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Global( "ADDON_NAME", common.GetAddonName() )
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function ReloadAddon()
	common.StateUnloadManagedAddon( ADDON_NAME )
	common.StateLoadManagedAddon( ADDON_NAME )
	LogInfo( string.format( "Addon [%s] has been reloaded.", ADDON_NAME ) )
end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Standard library extension 
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
do
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--[[
	   
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	function math.sign( number )
		return number < 0 and -1 or 1
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	function math.round( number, limit, cutOff )
		limit = type( limit ) == "number" and limit or 0
		local multipler = 10 ^ limit
		local diff = cutOff and 0 or 0.5
		if number >= 0 then
			return math.floor( number * multipler + diff ) / multipler
		else
			return math.ceil( number * multipler - diff ) / multipler
		end
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	function math.clamp( number, min, max )
		if type( min ) == "number" then number = math.max( number, min ) end
		if type( max ) == "number" then number = math.min( number, max ) end
	
		return number
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	function math.wrap( number, min, max )
		min, max = math.min( min, max ), math.max( min, max )
		local diff = max - min
		local mod = math.fmod( number - min, diff )
		if mod < 0 then
			mod = mod + diff
		end
		return min + mod
	end
		--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	do
		local hash = {}
		local depth = 0
		--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
		function table.clone( val, out )
			if type( val ) == "table" then
				out = type( out ) == "table" and out or {}
				
				if not hash[ val ] then
					hash[ val ] = out
			
					depth = depth + 1
					for k, v in pairs( val ) do
						out[ k ] = table.clone( v, out[ k ] )
					end
					depth = depth - 1
			
				else
					out = hash[ val ]
				end
			
				if depth == 0 then
					hash = {}
				end
			
				return out
			else
				if val ~= nil then
					return val
				else
					return out
				end
			end
		end
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	]]
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	table.size = table.nkeys
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	function table.imap( tab )
		local map = {}
		for k, v in ipairs( tab ) do map[ v ] = k end
		return map
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	function table.map( tab )
		local map = {}
		for k, v in pairs( tab ) do map[ v ] = k end
		return map
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--     table.maxn!
	--        
	--  nil       0
	function table.maxn2( tab )
		local max
		for key in pairs( tab ) do
			if type( key ) == "number" then
				max = math.max( max or key, key )
			end
		end
		return max
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--      , nil    
	function table.minn( tab )
		local min
		for key in pairs( tab ) do
			if type( key ) == "number" then
				min = math.min( min or key, key )
			end
		end
		
		return min
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--  table.insert     
	--   table.insert    -     1
	function table.append( tab, arg1, arg2 )
		if type( arg1 ) == "table" then
			for _, val in ipairs( arg1 ) do
				table.insert( tab, val )
			end
			
		elseif type( arg2 ) == "table" and type( arg1 ) == "number" then
			for _, val in ipairs( arg2 ) do
				table.insert( tab, arg1, val )
				arg1 = arg1 + 1
			end
		end
		
		return tab
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--     0  1
	function table.normalize( tab )
		if tab and tab[ 0 ] then table.insert( tab, 0, nil ) end
		return tab
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--     1  0
	function table.denormalize( tab )
		if tab and tab[ 0 ] == nil then
			local size = #tab
			for i = 1, size do
				tab[ i - 1 ] = tab[ i ]
			end
			tab[ size ] = nil
		end
		return tab
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--  val = tab[ arg1 ][ arg2 ]...[ argN ]
	function table.index( tab, ... )
		local val = tab
		
		for _, key in ipairs( {...} ) do
			if val == nil then return end
			val = tab[ key ]
			tab = val
		end
		
		return val
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--  tab[ arg1 ][ arg2 ]...[ argN - 1 ] = argN
	function table.newindex( tab, ... )
		local arg = { ... }
		local n = select( "#", ... )
		local val = arg[ n ]
		local key = arg[ n - 1 ]
		
		local t, k
		
		for i = 1, n - 2 do
			k = arg[ i ]
			t = tab[ k ] or {}
			tab[ k ] = t
			tab = t
		end
		
		tab[ key ] = val
		
		return tab
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	local function def_comp( v1, v2 ) return v1 < v2 end
	local function def_equal( v1, v2 ) return v1 == v2 end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--     tab   entry,    
	function table.getcount( tab, entry, equal )
		equal = equal or def_equal
		local counter = 0
		for id, value in pairs( tab ) do
			if equal( entry, value ) then
				counter = counter + 1
			end
		end
		return counter
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--     ,    
	function table.search( tab, entry, equal )
		equal = equal or def_equal
		for k, v in pairs( tab ) do
			if equal( v, entry ) then
				return true, k
			end
		end
		return false
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--    ,   1 
	--     
	--     true, , 
	--     false,      
	--		  table.insert   ,     
	function table.binsearch( tab, entry, fless, fequal )		
		fless, fequal = fless or def_comp, fequal or def_equal
		
		local minn, maxn = 1, #tab
		local key, val, less = 1
		
		while minn <= maxn do
			key = math.floor( ( minn + maxn ) / 2 )
			val = tab[ key ]
			less = fless( entry, val )
			
			if less then
				maxn = key - 1
				
			elseif fequal( entry, val ) then
				return true, key, val
				
			else
				minn = key + 1
			end
		end
		
		key = less ~= false and key or key + 1
		return false, key, tab[ key ]
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--          
	function table.traverse( tab, mutator )
		for k, v in pairs( tab ) do
			if type( v ) == 'table' then
				tab[ k ] = table.traverse( v, mutator )
			else
				tab[ k ] = mutator( k, v )
			end
		end
		return tab
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--    /   tab 
	function table.getrandom( tab )
		if #tab == table.size( tab ) then
			return table.igetrandom( tab )
		end
		
		local keys = {}
		
		for key in pairs( tab ) do
			table.insert( keys, key )
		end
		
		local randomKey = keys[ common.GetRandInt( 1, #keys ) ]
		return randomKey, tab[ randomKey ]
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--    /   tab,  array  
	function table.igetrandom( tab )
		local size = #tab
		if size == 0 then
			return nil, nil
		end
		
		local randomKey = common.GetRandInt( 1, size )
		return randomKey, tab[ randomKey ]
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	local stringSpecialChars = table.map{ "^", "$", "(", ")", "%", ".", "[", "]", "*", "+", "-", "?" }
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--        lua
	function string.escape( str )
		return string.gsub( str, "(.)", function( c )
			if stringSpecialChars[ c ] then 
				return "%" .. c
			else
				return c
			end
		end )
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--   str      separators.   noEscape     (  %s, %d  )
	--  separators    -   %s ( )
	function string.split( str, separators, noEscape )
		if not separators then
			separators = "%s"
			noEscape = true
		end
		if not noEscape then
			separators = string.escape( separators )
		end
		local splitted = {}
		for part in string.gmatch( str, "([^" .. separators .. "]+)" ) do
			table.insert( splitted, part )
		end
		return splitted
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
end

	IsValidText = common.IsValidText

	NumberWs = common.FormatNumber
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	local ews = common.GetEmptyWString()
	function GetEWs() return ews end
	GetEVt = common.CreateValuedText   -- :  GetEVt  CreateVt       
	CreateVt = common.CreateValuedText --  GetEVt     CreateVt    (   )
	GetEVo = common.CreateValuedObject
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--  ,             (   )
	--          
	function ValidateText( text )
		return IsValidText( text ) and text or GetEWs()
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--    values (WString \ ValuedText \ ValuedObject)   ValuedText
	--      (   __accumulated_value, __added_value)
	--      values
	function JoinTextValues( values, glueFormatWString, iter )
		local result
		local glueFormat = glueFormatWString or GetStateText( nil, "DefaultJoinTextValuesFormat" )
		iter = iter ~= nil and iter or ipairs
		
		for _, value in iter( values ) do
			if not result then
				result = value
			else
				result =  CreateVt{
					format = glueFormat,
					__accumulated_value = result,
					__added_value = value
				}
			end
		end
	
		return result
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
end

do
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	local _textDefaultGroupId = "Common"

	local _textAddonCache = {}
	local _textStateGroups = {}

	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	local function GetGroupText( group, groupCache, sysName, optional )
		local result = groupCache[ sysName ]
		if result == nil then
			local hasText = group:HasText( sysName )
			if hasText then
				result = group:GetText( sysName )
			elseif optional then
				result = false
			else
				result = GetEWs()
			end
			groupCache[ sysName ] = result
		end
		return result
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--   sysName    sysGroup ( Common  nil)
	--   optional      
	function GetAddonText( sysGroup, sysName, optional )
		sysGroup = sysGroup or _textDefaultGroupId
		local group = _textAddonGroups[ sysGroup ]
		if not group then
			group = common.GetAddonRelatedTextGroup( sysGroup, true ) or _dummyGroup
			_textAddonGroups[ sysGroup ] = group
			_textAddonCache[ sysGroup ] = {}
		end
		return GetGroupText( group, _textAddonCache[ sysGroup ], sysName, optional )

	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Custom pairs()
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
do
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	--     sortpairs
	-- C     (   )
	--     (   )
	--       ( )
	local function def_comp( tab )
		return function( k1, k2 )
			local v1, v2 = tab[ k1 ], tab[ k2 ]
			
			local tv1, tv2 = apitype( v1 ), apitype( v2 )
			if tv1 ~= tv2 then
				return tv1 < tv2
			end
			
			local tk1, tk2 = apitype( k1 ), apitype( k2 )
			if tk1 ~= tk2 then
				return tk1 < tk2
			end
			
			if tk1 == "number" or tk1 == "string" then
				return k1 < k2
			else
				return tostring( k1 ) < tostring( k2 )
			end
		end
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	-- pairs c   ,      
	--   -       
	--           
	function sortpairs( tab, comp )
		comp = comp or def_comp
	
		local list = {}
		for k in pairs( tab ) do
			table.insert( list, k )
		end
		
		table.sort( list, comp( tab ) )
		
		local first = list[ 1 ]
		local keys = {}
		
		for i, k in pairs( list ) do
			keys[ k ] = list[ i + 1 ]
		end
		
		return function( tab, key )
			if key == nil then
				key = first
			else
				key = keys[ key ]
			end
			return key, key ~= nil and tab[ key ]
		end, tab, nil
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
	-- ipairs  0  1
	function zpairs( tab )
		return function( tab, key )
			key = key + 1
			local val = tab[ key ]
			if val ~= nil then
				return key, val
			end
		end, tab, -1
	end
	--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
end
