function OnReactionXSliderChanged(params)
	local x = params.widget:GetPos()
	local pp = wtMap:GetPlacementPlain()
	pp.sizeX = x + 500
	wtMap:SetPlacementPlain(pp)
	vpWidth = x + 500
	OnEventAvatarPosChanged({})

	local cfg = userMods.GetGlobalConfigSection("LM_MapSize")
	if not cfg then
		cfg = {}
	end
	if not cfg.sizeY then
		cfg.sizeY = 0
	end
	cfg.sizeX = x

	userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection("LM_MapSize", cfg)
end

function OnReactionYSliderChanged(params)
	local y = params.widget:GetPos()
	local pp = wtMap:GetPlacementPlain()
	pp.sizeY = y + 500
	wtMap:SetPlacementPlain(pp)
	vpHeight = y + 500
	OnEventAvatarPosChanged({})

	local cfg = userMods.GetGlobalConfigSection("LM_MapSize")
	if not cfg then
		cfg = {}
	end
	if not cfg.sizeX then
		cfg.sizeX = 0
	end

	cfg.sizeY = y

	userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection("LM_MapSize", cfg)
end

-- нажали кнопку сохранить в диалоге сохранения
function OnReactionDialogSaveMapSaveButtonPressed(params)
	local mapName = sanitizeMapName(fws(wtDialogSaveMap:GetChildChecked("NameMapEdit", false):GetText()))
	if not mapName then
		return
	end
	local mapTable = mapSaveToTable()

	saveStoredMap(mapName, mapTable)
	loadedMapName = mapName
	mapMarkersDirty = false
	wtDialogSaveMap:Show(false)
	userMods.SendSelfChatMessage(tws(mapName .. " >>> " .. messageSaved), "notice")
	if mapName == currentLocationName then
		wtButtonQuickLoad:Show(true)
	end
end

function OnReactionDialogLoadMapCloseButtonPressed(params)
	wtDialogLoadMap:Show(false)
	local container = wtDialogLoadMap:GetChildChecked("MapsContainer", false)
	mapListWidgets = clearDynamicWidgets(container, mapListWidgets)
end

function OnReactionDialogMarkersListMapCloseButtonPressed(params)
	wtDialogMarkersListMap:Show(false)
	local container = wtDialogMarkersListMap:GetChildChecked("MapsContainer", false)
	clearSelectedMarkerHighlight()
	markerListWidgets = clearDynamicWidgets(container, markerListWidgets)
	markerRowCoords = {}
end

-- нажали кнопку загрузить в диалоге загрузки карты
function getMapNameRowFromWidget(widget)
	local row = widget
	for i = 1, 5 do
		if not row or not row:IsValid() then
			return nil
		end

		local okName, name = pcall(function()
			return row:GetName()
		end)
		if okName and name == "MapNameButton" then
			return row
		end

		local parentOk, parent = pcall(function()
			return row:GetParent()
		end)
		if not parentOk then
			return nil
		end
		row = parent
	end
	return nil
end

function OnReactionMapNameButtonPressed(params)
	local mapName = fws(params.widget:GetChildChecked("MapNameText", false):GetValuedText():ToWString())
	wtDialogLoadMap:Show(false)
	local mapTable = getStoredMap(mapName)
	if mapTable and mapLoadFromTable(mapTable, mapName) then
		userMods.SendSelfChatMessage(tws(mapName .. " >>> " .. messageLoaded), "notice")
	end
	local container = wtDialogLoadMap:GetChildChecked("MapsContainer", false)
	mapListWidgets = queueDynamicWidgetsCleanup(container, mapListWidgets)
end
-- удаляем карту
function OnReactionMapNameDeleteButtonPressed(params)
	local row = getMapNameRowFromWidget(params.widget)
	if not row then
		return
	end
	local mapName = sanitizeMapName(fws(row:GetChildChecked("MapNameText", false):GetValuedText():ToWString()))
	if deleteStoredMap(mapName) then
		local clearVisibleMap = false
		if mapName == loadedMapName then
			deletedCurrentMapName = mapName
			loadedMapName = nil
			mapMarkersDirty = false
			clearVisibleMap = true
		elseif mapName == currentLocationName and not loadedMapName then
			deletedCurrentMapName = mapName
			mapMarkersDirty = false
			clearVisibleMap = true
		end
		if clearVisibleMap then
			clearMap()
		end
		userMods.SendSelfChatMessage(tws(mapName .. " >>> " .. messageDeleted), "notice")
		notifyAboutCurrentZoneMap()
	end
	wtDialogLoadMap:Show(false)
	local container = wtDialogLoadMap:GetChildChecked("MapsContainer", false)
	mapListWidgets = queueDynamicWidgetsCleanup(container, mapListWidgets)
end

function OnReactionMapNameRenameButtonPressed(params)
	updateCurrentLocation()
	local newName = currentLocationName
	if not newName or not params or not params.widget then
		userMods.SendSelfChatMessage(tws("RENAME NO TARGET"), "notice")
		return
	end

	local row = getMapNameRowFromWidget(params.widget)
	if not row then
		userMods.SendSelfChatMessage(tws("RENAME NO ROW"), "notice")
		return
	end

	local oldName = fws(row:GetChildChecked("MapNameText", false):GetValuedText():ToWString())
	oldName = sanitizeMapName(oldName)
	newName = sanitizeMapName(newName)
	if not oldName or not newName then
		userMods.SendSelfChatMessage(tws("RENAME BAD NAME"), "notice")
		return
	end
	if oldName == newName then
		userMods.SendSelfChatMessage(tws(oldName .. " >>> RENAME SAME"), "notice")
		return
	end
	if not getStoredMap(oldName) then
		userMods.SendSelfChatMessage(tws(oldName .. " >>> RENAME NOT FOUND"), "notice")
		return
	end
	if getStoredMap(newName) then
		userMods.SendSelfChatMessage(tws(newName .. " >>> RENAME EXISTS"), "notice")
		return
	end

	if renameStoredMap(oldName, newName) then
		local renamedMap = getStoredMap(newName)
		if renamedMap then
			mapLoadFromTable(renamedMap, newName)
		end
		userMods.SendSelfChatMessage(tws(oldName .. " >>> " .. newName .. " >>> " .. messageRenamed), "notice")
		wtDialogLoadMap:Show(false)
		local container = wtDialogLoadMap:GetChildChecked("MapsContainer", false)
		mapListWidgets = queueDynamicWidgetsCleanup(container, mapListWidgets)
		notifyAboutCurrentZoneMap()
	end
end

function OnReactionMapMarkerSelectButtonPressed(params)
	if not params or not params.widget then
		return
	end

	selectMarkerByRowName(params.widget:GetName())
end
function OnReactionMapMarkerDeleteButtonPressed(params)
	if not params or not params.widget then
		return
	end

	local row = params.widget:GetParent()
	if not row or not row:IsValid() then
		return
	end

	local rowName = row:GetName()
	local coords = markerRowCoords[rowName]
	if not coords or not markers[coords.x] or not markers[coords.x][coords.y] then
		return
	end

	local marker = markers[coords.x][coords.y]
	if marker:IsValid() then
		marker:DestroyWidget()
	end
	markers[coords.x][coords.y] = nil
	if next(markers[coords.x]) == nil then
		markers[coords.x] = nil
	end

	local container = wtDialogMarkersListMap:GetChildChecked("MapsContainer", false)
	if container:IsContain(row) then
		container:Remove(row)
	end

	for index, widget in ipairs(markerListWidgets) do
		if widget == row then
			table.remove(markerListWidgets, index)
			break
		end
	end

	if selectedMarkerRowName == rowName then
		selectedMarkerRowName = nil
	end
	markerRowCoords[rowName] = nil
	mapMarkersDirty = true
	queueSingleWidgetCleanup(row)
end

function addPoint(x, y)
	x = tonumber(x)
	y = tonumber(y)
	if not x or not y then
		return false
	end

	if not points[x] then
		points[x] = {}
	end
	if points[x][y] then
		return false
	end

	local mapPoint = wtMapContainer:CreateChildByDesc(wtMapPoint:GetWidgetDesc())
	points[x][y] = mapPoint
	local p = mapPoint:GetPlacementPlain()
	p.posX = x * 5 * zoom
	p.posY = -y * 5 * zoom
	p.sizeX = 5 * zoom
	p.sizeY = 5 * zoom
	mapPoint:SetPlacementPlain(p)
	mapPoint:SetBackgroundColor(currentColor)
	animateFade(mapPoint)
	return true
end

function addMarker(x, y, markerType)
	x = tonumber(x)
	y = tonumber(y)
	if not x or not y or type(markerType) ~= "string" then
		return false
	end

	local t = {}
	t["LockMarker"] = wtLockMarker
	t["CrownMarker"] = wtCrownMarker
	t["OrangeMobMarker"] = wtOrangeMobMarker
	t["BlueMobMarker"] = wtBlueMobMarker
	t["BulbMarker"] = wtBulbMarker
	t["RedCircleMarker"] = wtRedCircleMarker
	t["RedMobMarker"] = wtRedMobMarker
	t["GreenMobMarker"] = wtGreenMobMarker

	t["RedStarMarker"] = wtRedStarMarker
	t["GreenStarMarker"] = wtGreenStarMarker
	t["BlueStarMarker"] = wtBlueStarMarker
	t["GiftMarker"] = wtGiftMarker
	t["InsightMarker"] = wtInsightMarker
	t["PotionMarker"] = wtPotionMarker
	t["QuestionMarker"] = wtQuestionMarker
	t["RarityMarker"] = wtRarityMarker
	t["RuneMarker"] = wtRuneMarker
	t["ServiceMarker"] = wtServiceMarker

	local mt = t[markerType]
	if not mt then
		l("[ChatGPT_LabMap] invalid marker type skipped")
		return false
	end

	if not markers[x] then
		markers[x] = {}
	end
	if markers[x][y] then
		return false
	end

	local m = wtMapContainer:CreateChildByDesc(mt:GetWidgetDesc())
	m:SetName(markerType);
	local markerSize, markerOffset = getMarkerVisualSize(markerType)
	if zoom < 1 then
		move(m, x * zoom - markerOffset * zoom, -y * zoom - markerOffset * zoom, 0)
		resize(m, markerSize * zoom, markerSize * zoom, 0)
	else
		move(m, x * zoom - markerOffset, -y * zoom - markerOffset, 0)
		resize(m, markerSize, markerSize, 0)
	end
	animateFade(m)

	markers[x][y] = m
	return true
end

function hasAnyMarker()
	for x, _ in pairs(markers) do
		for y, _ in pairs(markers[x]) do
			if markers[x][y] then
				return true
			end
		end
	end
	return false
end
function OnEventAvatarClientZoneChanged()
	local autoSaveName = loadedMapName or currentLocationName
	if autoSaveName and mapMarkersDirty then
		if autoSaveName ~= deletedCurrentMapName then
			saveStoredMap(autoSaveName, mapSaveToTable())
			userMods.SendSelfChatMessage(tws(autoSaveName .. " >>> " .. messageSaved), "notice")
		end
		mapMarkersDirty = false
	end

	loadedMapName = nil
	deletedCurrentMapName = nil
	local zoneInfo = cartographer.GetCurrentZoneInfo()
	if not isLabyrinthZone(zoneInfo) then
		currentLabOwnerName = nil
	end
	updateCurrentLocation()
	reset()
	notifyAboutCurrentZoneMap()
end
function clearMap()
	if wtDialogMarkersListMap and wtDialogMarkersListMap:IsVisible() then
		local container = wtDialogMarkersListMap:GetChildChecked("MapsContainer", false)
		markerListWidgets = clearDynamicWidgets(container, markerListWidgets)
		markerRowCoords = {}
		clearSelectedMarkerHighlight()
	end

	for x, _ in pairs(points) do
		for y, _ in pairs(points[x]) do
			points[x][y]:DestroyWidget()
		end
	end
	points = {}

	for x, _ in pairs(markers) do
		for y, _ in pairs(markers[x]) do
			markers[x][y]:DestroyWidget()
		end
	end
	markers = {}
end

function clearMapBeforeDisable()
	loadedMapName = nil
	mapMarkersDirty = false
	clearMap()
end
function reset()
	clearMap()
	wtAvatarArrow:Rotate(avatar.GetDir())
	OnEventAvatarPosChanged()
end

function enableAddon()
	local pp = wtHeader:GetPlacementPlain()
	pp.alignX = ENUM_AlignX_CENTER
	wtHeader:SetPlacementPlain(pp)
	wtHeader:SetClipContent(false)
	wtMainPanel:SetClipContent(false)

	resize(wtMainPanel, 500, 500, 0)

	wtAvatarArrow:Rotate(avatar.GetDir())
	OnEventAvatarPosChanged()
end

function disableAddon()
	clearMapBeforeDisable()
	local pp = wtHeader:GetPlacementPlain()
	pp.alignX = ENUM_AlignX_RIGHT
	wtHeader:SetPlacementPlain(pp)
	resize(wtMainPanel, 105, 32, 0)
	wtHeader:SetClipContent(true)
	wtMainPanel:SetClipContent(true)
end

-- скрыть/показать главное акно аддона
function OnReactionHeaderButtonPressed(params)
	addonIsEnabled = not addonIsEnabled
	if addonIsEnabled then
		enableAddon()
	else
		disableAddon()
	end
end

-- выбрать цвет карты
function OnReactionColorButtonPressed(params)
	currentColor = params.widget:GetBackgroundColor()
	wtColorMenu:Show(false)
	updateColors(currentColor)
end

function updateColors(color)
	for x, _ in pairs(points) do
		for y, _ in pairs(points[x]) do
			points[x][y]:SetBackgroundColor(color)
		end
	end
end

-- масштаб
function OnReactionZoomButtonPressed(params)
	local name = params.widget:GetName()
	if name == "PlusButton" then
		zoom = zoom + 0.2
		if zoom > 2 then
			zoom = 2
		end
	elseif name == "MinusButton" then
		zoom = zoom - 0.2
		if zoom < 0.4 then
			zoom = 0.4
		end
	end

	local cfg = userMods.GetGlobalConfigSection("LM_MapSize") or {}
	cfg.zoom = zoom
	if cfg.sizeX == nil then
		cfg.sizeX = 0
	end
	if cfg.sizeY == nil then
		cfg.sizeY = 0
	end
	userMods.SetGlobalConfigSection("LM_MapSize", cfg)

	updateZoom()
end

function calcRealpos()
	local pos = avatar.GetPos()
	if not pos then
		return nil
	end

	local posX = tonumber(pos.posX)
	local posY = tonumber(pos.posY)
	local posZ = tonumber(pos.posZ)
	if not posX or not posY or not posZ then
		return nil
	end

	local realpos = {}
	local _

	realpos.fx = posX
	realpos.fy = posY
	realpos.fz = posZ

	realpos.intx, _ = math.modf(posX)
	realpos.inty, _ = math.modf(posY)
	realpos.intz, _ = math.modf(posZ)

	realpos.x5 = (realpos.intx - (realpos.intx) % 5) / 5
	realpos.y5 = (realpos.inty - (realpos.inty) % 5) / 5
	realpos.z5 = (realpos.intz - (realpos.intz) % 5) / 5

	return realpos
end

function mapSaveToTable()
	local t = {}

	t.points = {}
	for x, _ in pairs(points) do
		for y, _ in pairs(points[x]) do
			table.insert(t.points, { x = x, y = y })
		end
	end

	t.markers = {}
	for x, _ in pairs(markers) do
		for y, _ in pairs(markers[x]) do
			table.insert(t.markers, { x = x, y = y, name = markers[x][y]:GetName() })
		end
	end

	return t
end

function mapLoadFromTable(mapTable, mapName)
	if type(mapTable) ~= "table" then
		return false
	end

	local storedPoints = type(mapTable.points) == "table" and mapTable.points or {}
	local storedMarkers = type(mapTable.markers) == "table" and mapTable.markers or {}

	wtMapContainer:FinishMoveEffect()
	loadingMap = true
	clearMap()

	for _, pointInfo in ipairs(storedPoints) do
		if type(pointInfo) == "table" then
			addPoint(pointInfo.x, pointInfo.y)
		end
	end

	for _, markerInfo in ipairs(storedMarkers) do
		if type(markerInfo) == "table" then
			addMarker(markerInfo.x, markerInfo.y, markerInfo.name)
		end
	end

	refreshMarkerListIfVisible()
	OnEventAvatarPosChanged({})
	loadingMap = false
	mapMarkersDirty = false
	loadedMapName = sanitizeMapName(mapName)
	deletedCurrentMapName = nil
	return true
end
function Init()
	messageSaved = "SAVE"
	messageDeleted = "DELETE"
	messageLoaded = "LOAD"
	messageRenamed = "RENAME"

	wtFactoryCache = mainForm:GetFactoryCache()
	wtMainPanel = mainForm:GetChildChecked("LabMap", false)

	wtMarkerList = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("MarkerList", false)

	wtMapMenu = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("MapMenu", false)
	wtColorMenu = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("ColorMenu", false)

	wtRedMobMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("RedMobMarker", false)
	wtGreenMobMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("GreenMobMarker", false)
	wtOrangeMobMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("OrangeMobMarker", false)
	wtLockMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("LockMarker", false)
	wtCrownMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("CrownMarker", false)
	wtBlueMobMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("BlueMobMarker", false)
	wtBulbMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("BulbMarker", false)
	wtRedCircleMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("RedCircleMarker", false)

	wtRedStarMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("RedStarMarker", false)
	wtGreenStarMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("GreenStarMarker", false)
	wtBlueStarMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("BlueStarMarker", false)
	wtGiftMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("GiftMarker", false)
	wtInsightMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("InsightMarker", false)
	wtPotionMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("PotionMarker", false)
	wtQuestionMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("QuestionMarker", false)
	wtRarityMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("RarityMarker", false)
	wtRuneMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("RuneMarker", false)
	wtServiceMarker = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("ServiceMarker", false)


	wtMapPoint = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("MapPoint", false)

	wtMap = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("Map", false)
	wtMap:SetBackgroundColor({ r = 0.0, g = 1.0, b = 0.0, a = 0.0 })

	wtMapContainer = wtMap:GetChildChecked("MapContainer", false)
	wtMapContainer:SetBackgroundColor({ r = 1.0, g = 0.0, b = 0.0, a = 0.0 })

	wtHeader = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("Header", false)

	wtHeaderButton = wtHeader:GetChildChecked("HeaderButton", false)

	wtAddMarker = wtHeader:GetChildChecked("ButtonAddMarker", false)
	wtButtonMapMenu = wtHeader:GetChildChecked("ButtonMapMenu", false)
	wtButtonQuickLoad = wtHeader:GetChildChecked("ButtonQuickLoad", false)

	wtWhiteButton = wtColorMenu:GetChildChecked("WhiteButton", false)
	wtWhiteButton:SetBackgroundColor({ r = 1.0, g = 1.0, b = 1.0, a = 1.0 })
	wtBlackButton = wtColorMenu:GetChildChecked("BlackButton", false)
	wtBlackButton:SetBackgroundColor({ r = 0.0, g = 0.0, b = 0.0, a = 1.0 })
	wtRedButton = wtColorMenu:GetChildChecked("RedButton", false)
	wtRedButton:SetBackgroundColor({ r = 1.0, g = 0.0, b = 0.0, a = 1.0 })
	wtBlueButton = wtColorMenu:GetChildChecked("BlueButton", false)
	wtBlueButton:SetBackgroundColor({ r = 0.0, g = 0.0, b = 1.0, a = 1.0 })

	wtPlusButton = wtHeader:GetChildChecked("PlusButton", false)
	wtMinusButton = wtHeader:GetChildChecked("MinusButton", false)

	wtDialogSaveMap = mainForm:GetChildChecked("DialogSaveMap", false)
	wtDialogLoadMap = mainForm:GetChildChecked("DialogLoadMap", false)
	wtDialogSizeMap = mainForm:GetChildChecked("DialogSizeMap", false)
	wtDialogMarkersListMap = mainForm:GetChildChecked("DialogMarkersListMap", false)

	wtMapNameButton = wtDialogLoadMap:GetChildChecked("MapNameButton", false)
	wtMarkerNameButton = wtDialogMarkersListMap:GetChildChecked("MarkerNameButton", false)

	-- Localization
	wtHeader:GetChildChecked("ButtonColorMenu", false):GetChildChecked("ButtonColorMenuText", false):SetVal("value",
		tws(GTL("Color")))

	wtButtonMapMenu:GetChildChecked("ButtonMapMenuText", false):SetVal("value", tws(GTL("Map")))
	wtButtonQuickLoad:GetChildChecked("ButtonQuickLoadText", false):SetVal("value", tws(GTL("Yes")))
	wtMapMenu:GetChildChecked("ButtonMapSave", false):GetChildChecked("ButtonMapMenuSaveText", false):SetVal("value",
		tws(GTL("Save")))
	wtMapMenu:GetChildChecked("ButtonMapLoad", false):GetChildChecked("ButtonMapMenuLoadText", false):SetVal("value",
		tws(GTL("Load")))
	wtMapMenu:GetChildChecked("ButtonMapSize", false):GetChildChecked("ButtonMapMenuSizeText", false):SetVal("value",
		tws(GTL("Size")))
	wtMapMenu:GetChildChecked("ButtonMapMarkersList", false):GetChildChecked("ButtonMapMarkersListText", false):SetVal(
		"value", tws(GTL("Marker List")))

	wtDialogSaveMap:GetChildChecked("DialogSaveMapHeader", false):GetChildChecked("DialogSaveMapHeaderText", false)
		:SetVal("value", tws(GTL("Save Map")))
	wtDialogSaveMap:GetChildChecked("DialogSaveMapSaveButton", false):GetChildChecked("MapSaveButtonText", false):SetVal(
		"value", tws(GTL("Save")))

	wtDialogLoadMap:GetChildChecked("DialogLoadMapHeader", false):GetChildChecked("DialogLoadMapHeaderText", false)
		:SetVal("value", tws(GTL("Load Map")))
	wtMapNameButton:GetChildChecked("MapNameDeleteButton", false):GetChildChecked("MapNameDeleteText", false):SetVal(
		"value", tws(GTL("Delete")))

	wtDialogSizeMap:GetChildChecked("DialogSizeMapHeader", false):GetChildChecked("DialogSizeMapHeaderText", false)
		:SetVal("value", tws(GTL("Map Size")))
	wtDialogSizeMap:GetChildChecked("XText", false):SetVal("value", tws(GTL("Width")))
	wtDialogSizeMap:GetChildChecked("YText", false):SetVal("value", tws(GTL("Height")))

	wtHeader:GetChildChecked("ButtonAddMarker", false):GetChildChecked("ButtonAddMarkerText", false):SetVal("value",
		tws(GTL("Marker")))


	local mapPlacement = wtMap:GetPlacementPlain()
	vpWidth = mapPlacement.sizeX
	vpHeight = mapPlacement.sizeY

	wtAvatarArrow = wtMainPanel:GetChildChecked("AvatarArrow", false)

	wtMapContainer:AddChild(wtAvatarArrow)

	common.RegisterReactionHandler(OnReactionHeaderButtonPressed, "ReactionHeaderButtonPressed")
	common.RegisterReactionHandler(OnReactionColorButtonPressed, "ReactionColorButtonPressed")
	common.RegisterReactionHandler(OnReactionZoomButtonPressed, "ReactionZoomButtonPressed")

	DnD.Init(wtMainPanel, wtHeader, true)
	DnD.Init(wtMainPanel, wtHeaderButton, true)
	DnD.Init(wtDialogSaveMap, wtDialogSaveMap:GetChildChecked("DialogSaveMapHeader", false), true)
	DnD.Init(wtDialogLoadMap, wtDialogLoadMap:GetChildChecked("DialogLoadMapHeader", false), true)
	DnD.Init(wtDialogSizeMap, wtDialogSizeMap:GetChildChecked("DialogSizeMapHeader", false), true)
	DnD.Init(wtDialogMarkersListMap, wtDialogMarkersListMap:GetChildChecked("DialogLoadMapHeader", false), true)

	if avatar.IsExist() then
		OnEventAvatarCreated({})
	else
		common.RegisterEventHandler(OnEventAvatarCreated, "EVENT_AVATAR_CREATED")
	end

	if addonIsEnabled then
		enableAddon()
	else
		disableAddon()
	end

	resize(wtMapContainer, 1, 1, 0)
end

Init()
l("[ChatGPT_LabMap] END v60")

local ADDON_NAME = "ChatGPT_WidgetTreeLogger_v1"
local MAX_NODES_PER_SECTION = 90000
local MAX_DEPTH = 60

local dumpedAt = {}
local totalNodes = 0
local visited = {}
local limitLogged = false
local discoveredRoots = {}

local knownRoots = {
	"ActionbarControls", "AlchemyV2", "ArenaTimer", "AstralDamageAnnounce",
	"AstralMap", "BattleGrounds", "BillingBonuses", "BonusPools", "BossPlate",
	"Buffs", "BuffsAstral", "BugReport", "Castbar", "ChangeRoom", "ChatBubbles",
	"ChatInput", "ChatLog", "Checkroom", "ChoiceFaction", "ClassManager",
	"Compendium", "ContextAEMarker", "ContextActionbar", "ContextActions",
	"ContextAnnounceCustom", "ContextAuction", "ContextBag", "ContextBulletinBoard2",
	"ContextBuyPopup", "ContextBuySplitStack", "ContextCharacter2",
	"ContextCurrencyExchange", "ContextDamageVisualization", "ContextDepositeBox",
	"ContextDragNDrop", "ContextEmotions", "ContextFXPlayer", "ContextGuild",
	"ContextLootBag", "ContextMatchMakingNotifier", "ContextModalMessage",
	"ContextOvertip", "ContextPOIMarker", "ContextPlayerTrade", "ContextPopup",
	"ContextShipCustomization", "ContextShipDevice", "ContextShipDeviceCrosshair",
	"ContextShipDeviceNavigator", "ContextShipDevicesReplacement", "ContextShipHangar",
	"ContextShipPlate", "ContextSocial", "ContextSplitstack", "ContextStable",
	"ContextTooltip", "ContextUniMessageBox", "ContextVendorTrade", "CraftReforge",
	"CraftV22", "Death", "DetectorManager", "Enchanter", "EscMenu", "EventCalendar",
	"EventNotification", "FatalityMessage", "Fitting", "GenericBrowser",
	"GuildHeraldicsBuilder", "HangarDevices", "HeroesArenaTimer", "InspectCharacter",
	"InstanceKick", "InstanceModifiers", "ItemMall", "LFG", "LagMeter",
	"LoginLottery", "LootMaster", "Lottery", "LotteryBox", "LotteryV2", "MailBox",
	"MainAddonMainForm", "Map", "MatchMakingScoreBoard", "Medals", "MedalsAnnouncer",
	"Minimap", "NecroVision", "NewRunes", "NpcTalk", "Options", "PinMenu", "Plates",
	"ProcsVisualization", "QuestLog", "QuestTracker", "Questions", "Raid", "Rating",
	"ReadyCheck", "Remort", "RemortEquipment", "RemortList", "RemortShareAbility",
	"RewardsExchange", "RollGreedNeed", "RouletteBox", "RuneCombiner", "SOSMessage",
	"ScrollingCombatText", "SetBonusCatalog", "ShipOvertips", "ShipSummon",
	"SoulTalents", "Sounds", "SpellPanel", "Spellbook", "StalkerCartridgeBelt2",
	"StrongBox", "StrongholdBestiary", "StrongholdChoiceDungeon", "SubtitleShipInfo",
	"Subtitles", "TabSelector", "TalentBuilder", "TalentInformer", "TargetSale",
	"TargetSelection", "Teleport", "TheOrder", "Tutorial", "UpgradeMetaItem",
	"UserAddonManager", "Vote", "Warnings", "WheelOfLoot", "WidgetTools",
	"WishMaster", "ZoneAnnounce"
}

local function log(message)
	if common and common.LogInfo then
		common.LogInfo(ADDON_NAME, tostring(message))
	end
end

local function safeCall(label, fn)
	local ok, result = pcall(fn)
	if ok then
		return result
	end
	log("ERROR " .. label .. ": " .. tostring(result))
	return nil
end

local function widgetName(widget)
	return safeCall("GetName", function()
		if widget and widget.GetName then
			return widget:GetName()
		end
		return "<no GetName>"
	end) or "<nil>"
end

local function widgetId(widget)
	return safeCall("GetId", function()
		if widget and widget.GetId then
			return widget:GetId()
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function widgetInstanceId(widget)
	return safeCall("GetInstanceId", function()
		if widget and widget.GetInstanceId then
			return widget:GetInstanceId()
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function widgetAddon(widget)
	return safeCall("GetAddonName", function()
		if widget and widget.GetAddonName then
			return widget:GetAddonName()
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function widgetType(widget)
	return safeCall("GetAddonType", function()
		if widget and widget.GetAddonType then
			return widget:GetAddonType()
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function widgetApiType(widget)
	return safeCall("apitype", function()
		if apitype then
			return apitype(widget)
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function widgetVisible(widget)
	return safeCall("IsVisible", function()
		if widget and widget.IsVisible then
			return widget:IsVisible()
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function widgetEnabled(widget)
	return safeCall("IsEnabled", function()
		if widget and widget.IsEnabled then
			return widget:IsEnabled()
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function widgetParentName(widget)
	return safeCall("GetParent", function()
		if widget and widget.GetParent then
			local parent = widget:GetParent()
			if parent and parent.GetName then
				return parent:GetName()
			end
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function getNamedChildren(widget)
	return safeCall("GetNamedChildren", function()
		if widget and widget.GetNamedChildren then
			return widget:GetNamedChildren()
		end
		return nil
	end) or {}
end

local function boolMark(value)
	if value == nil then
		return "?"
	end
	return value and "1" or "0"
end

local function indent(depth)
	return string.rep("  ", depth)
end

local function markRoot(name)
	if name and name ~= "" and name ~= "stateMainForm" then
		discoveredRoots[name] = true
	end
end

local function getWidgetCoreTree(root)
	return safeCall("GetWidgetCoreTree", function()
		if root and root.GetWidgetCoreTree then
			return root:GetWidgetCoreTree(function(obj, key)
				local meta = getmetatable(obj)
				local widget = meta and meta.widget or nil
				if key == "widget" then
					return widget
				end
				if widget and type(widget[key]) == "function" then
					return function(self, ...)
						return widget[key](widget, ...)
					end
				end
				return nil
			end, {})
		end
		return nil
	end)
end

local function coreWidget(coreNode)
	local meta = coreNode and getmetatable(coreNode)
	return meta and meta.widget or nil
end

local function coreChildName(key)
	if type(key) ~= "string" then
		return nil
	end
	local name = string.match(key, "^wt(.+)$")
	if name == "" then
		return nil
	end
	return name
end

local function getCoreChildren(coreNode)
	local children = {}
	for key, value in pairs(coreNode or {}) do
		local childName = coreChildName(key)
		if childName and type(value) == "table" and coreWidget(value) then
			table.insert(children, { name = childName, node = value })
		end
	end
	table.sort(children, function(left, right)
		return tostring(left.name) < tostring(right.name)
	end)
	return children
end

local function shouldStop(depth, path)
	if totalNodes >= MAX_NODES_PER_SECTION then
		if not limitLogged then
			limitLogged = true
			log("NODE_LIMIT_REACHED " .. tostring(MAX_NODES_PER_SECTION))
		end
		return true
	end
	if depth > MAX_DEPTH then
		log(indent(depth) .. "... depth limit at " .. tostring(path))
		return true
	end
	return false
end

local function dumpWidgetLine(widget, depth, path, mode, pass)
	totalNodes = totalNodes + 1

	local id = widgetId(widget)
	local instanceId = widgetInstanceId(widget)
	local name = widgetName(widget)
	local addon = widgetAddon(widget) or "?"
	local typ = widgetType(widget) or "?"
	local apiType = widgetApiType(widget) or "?"
	local visible = boolMark(widgetVisible(widget))
	local enabled = boolMark(widgetEnabled(widget))
	local parentName = widgetParentName(widget) or "?"

	log(indent(depth) .. "- " .. path ..
		" pass=" .. tostring(pass) ..
		" name=" .. tostring(name) ..
		" id=" .. tostring(id or "?") ..
		" instanceId=" .. tostring(instanceId or "?") ..
		" addon=" .. tostring(addon) ..
		" type=" .. tostring(typ) ..
		" apiType=" .. tostring(apiType) ..
		" visible=" .. visible ..
		" enabled=" .. enabled ..
		" parentName=" .. tostring(parentName) ..
		" tree=" .. tostring(mode))
end

local function seenKey(widget)
	return widgetInstanceId(widget) or widgetId(widget)
end

local function dumpCoreNode(coreNode, depth, path, pass)
	local widget = coreWidget(coreNode)
	if not widget or shouldStop(depth, path) then
		return
	end

	local key = seenKey(widget)
	if key and visited[key] then
		log(indent(depth) .. "- " .. path .. " [seen key=" .. tostring(key) .. "]")
		return
	end
	if key then
		visited[key] = true
	end

	if depth == 1 then
		local rootName = path
		if rootName and rootName:sub(1, 14) == "stateMainForm." then
			rootName = rootName:sub(15)
		end
		markRoot(rootName)
	end

	dumpWidgetLine(widget, depth, path, "core", pass)

	for index, child in ipairs(getCoreChildren(coreNode)) do
		local childWidget = coreWidget(child.node)
		local runtimeName = widgetName(childWidget)
		local childName = child.name ~= "" and child.name or runtimeName
		local finalName = childName ~= "" and childName or ("#" .. tostring(index))
		local childPath = path .. "." .. tostring(finalName)
		dumpCoreNode(child.node, depth + 1, childPath, pass)
		if totalNodes >= MAX_NODES_PER_SECTION then
			return
		end
	end
end

local function dumpNamedWidget(widget, depth, path, pass)
	if not widget or shouldStop(depth, path) then
		return
	end

	local key = seenKey(widget)
	if key and visited[key] then
		log(indent(depth) .. "- " .. path .. " [seen key=" .. tostring(key) .. "]")
		return
	end
	if key then
		visited[key] = true
	end

	dumpWidgetLine(widget, depth, path, "named", pass)

	local children = getNamedChildren(widget)
	for index, child in ipairs(children) do
		local childName = widgetName(child)
		local finalName = childName ~= "" and childName or ("#" .. tostring(index))
		local childPath = path .. "." .. tostring(finalName)
		dumpNamedWidget(child, depth + 1, childPath, pass)
		if totalNodes >= MAX_NODES_PER_SECTION then
			return
		end
	end
end

local function rootList()
	local result = {}
	local added = {}

	for _, name in ipairs(knownRoots) do
		if not added[name] then
			added[name] = true
			table.insert(result, name)
		end
	end
	for name, _ in pairs(discoveredRoots) do
		if not added[name] then
			added[name] = true
			table.insert(result, name)
		end
	end

	table.sort(result)
	return result
end

local function dumpCore(root, pass)
	totalNodes = 0
	visited = {}
	limitLogged = false

	log("BEGIN core dump pass=" .. tostring(pass))
	local coreTree = getWidgetCoreTree(root)
	if coreTree then
		dumpCoreNode(coreTree, 0, "stateMainForm", pass)
	else
		log("CORE_TREE_UNAVAILABLE pass=" .. tostring(pass))
		dumpNamedWidget(root, 0, "stateMainForm", pass)
	end
	log("END core dump pass=" .. tostring(pass) .. " totalNodes=" .. tostring(totalNodes))
end

local function dumpNamedRoots(root, pass)
	totalNodes = 0
	visited = {}
	limitLogged = false

	log("BEGIN named roots dump pass=" .. tostring(pass))
	for _, name in ipairs(rootList()) do
		local widget = safeCall("GetChildUnchecked " .. name, function()
			if root.GetChildUnchecked then
				return root:GetChildUnchecked(name, false)
			end
			return nil
		end)
		if widget then
			log("ROOT " .. name .. " found pass=" .. tostring(pass))
			dumpNamedWidget(widget, 0, name, pass)
		else
			log("ROOT_MISSING " .. name .. " pass=" .. tostring(pass))
		end
	end
	log("END named roots dump pass=" .. tostring(pass) .. " totalNodes=" .. tostring(totalNodes))
end

local function dumpAll(pass)
	if dumpedAt[pass] then
		return
	end
	dumpedAt[pass] = true

	local root = safeCall("stateMainForm", function()
		return stateMainForm
	end)
	if not root then
		log("ROOT_MISSING stateMainForm pass=" .. tostring(pass))
		return
	end

	log("BEGIN combined widget dump pass=" .. tostring(pass))
	log("MAX_NODES_PER_SECTION " .. tostring(MAX_NODES_PER_SECTION))
	log("MAX_DEPTH " .. tostring(MAX_DEPTH))
	log("TREE_MODE core_plus_named_roots")
	dumpCore(root, pass)
	dumpNamedRoots(root, pass)
	log("END combined widget dump pass=" .. tostring(pass))
end

local function init()
	dumpAll(0)
end

if avatar and avatar.IsExist and avatar.IsExist() then
	init()
else
	if common and common.RegisterEventHandler then
		common.RegisterEventHandler(init, "EVENT_AVATAR_CREATED")
	else
		init()
	end
end
